name: Wiley
subject: Would love your input!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hi there, Peter.
I wanted to bump my team’s poll from yesterday to make sure you saw. I think Dems are ready to flip the House and hold the White House, but I wanted to hear from you.
Take our poll below, and let us know what you think!
Thanks,
Wiley
-------- begin original message --------
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2312-q4-wn?refcode=231209-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2312-q4-wn?refcode=231209-email]
Peter,
We are officially less than 11 months away from Election Day 2024. That means in less than a year, President Biden will be on the ballot, and Democrats across the country will be running to flip the House blue.
So, we’re reaching out with a question: Do you think Democrats have what it takes to hold the White House and flip the House?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2312-q4-wn-poll?refcode=231209-email]
NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2312-q4-wn-poll?refcode=231209-email]
UNSURE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2312-q4-wn-poll?refcode=231209-email]
All of us here on Team Wiley know how hard it is to win an election, but we also know that anything is possible when members of a grassroots movement work together toward a common goal.
We saw it in 2022 when Wiley defeated Bo Hines and flipped this seat. And we know what we have to do to win races across the country next year.
So, we want to hear from you: Do you think Democrats have what it takes to hold the White House and flip the House?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2312-q4-wn-poll?refcode=231209-email]
NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2312-q4-wn-poll?refcode=231209-email]
UNSURE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2312-q4-wn-poll?refcode=231209-email]
Thanks for your input!
Team Wiley
Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2312-q4-wn?refcode=231209-email&recurring=true]

https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]

Friends,
I have recently gotten back to using Substack consistently. And I intend to continue doing so. As you can imagine, this work is primarily funded by subscriptions, and this is why I rely on your support to continue doing what I'm doing.
To close out the year, I would like to send a signed copy of my book _Nothing to Lose, Everything to Gain: Being Black and Conservative in America_ to my paid subscribers and invite them to a private video call to discuss what I see at a national level, answer your questions, and hear your concerns.
NOTE: Signed book ONLY FOR Yearly and Founding-Member Subscribers. Monthly subscribers will be invited to the video call.
The reason I got into politics, and the reason why I still am involved, is that evil prevails when the good do nothing. I felt a void of real, authentic conservative voices dedicating themselves to better our country. I've sacrificed a *lot*, to give a voice to conservatives. I have been dragged through the mud all across the country... but there are no regrets. That is what God called me to do.
Now, if you appreciate what I do and would like me to continue, I kindly ask you to support me by becoming a paid subscriber and joining me for a conversation.
The cut-off date to subscribe will be December 26th, at 11:59 PM EST, and the video call will be on Saturday, December 30th, at 8 PM EST.
All paid subscribers will receive the link to the Zoom Call on December 27th on their Substack account's email.
Blessings,
Kathy

Subscribe by December 26th, 11:59 PM, get a signed copy of my book, and join a video call with me and my paid subscribers on Saturday, December 30th. | | | Dec 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, I have recently gotten back to using Substack consistently. And I intend to continue doing so. As you can imagine, this work is primarily funded by subscriptions, and this is why I rely on your support to continue doing what I'm doing. To close out the year, I would like to send a signed copy of my book Nothing to Lose, Everything to Gain: Being Black and Conservative in America to my paid subscribers and invite them to a private video call to discuss what I see at a national level, answer your questions, and hear your concerns. NOTE: Signed book ONLY FOR Yearly and Founding-Member Subscribers. Monthly subscribers will be invited to the video call. The reason I got into politics, and the reason why I still am involved, is that evil prevails when the good do nothing. I felt a void of real, authentic conservative voices dedicating themselves to better our country. I've sacrificed a lot, to give a voice to conservatives. I have been dragged through the mud all across the country... but there are no regrets. That is what God called me to do. Now, if you appreciate what I do and would like me to continue, I kindly ask you to support me by becoming a paid subscriber and joining me for a conversation. The cut-off date to subscribe will be December 26th, at 11:59 PM EST, and the video call will be on Saturday, December 30th, at 8 PM EST. All paid subscribers will receive the link to the Zoom Call on December 27th on their Substack account's email. Blessings, Kathy Make sure you guys: Step 1: LISTEN Step 2: SUBSCRIBE Step 3: RATE 5 🌟 Step 4: SHARE w/ others Purchase my book on Amazon: | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Kathy Barnette Be Better America, P.O. Box 659, Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006 ? ?

name: Katie Hill
subject: The hard truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74890320/442971809/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231209_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjAyYzZmZWQtZjQ5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4FCv8zpNZ9tvAdCDnQW_JobnapdhhnZtHSPyk7w8-Ck=)
---
I’m never going to be afraid of telling you the hard truth, Peter, and here it is: It’s dangerous to be a woman in politics. A recent study from Princeton University and the Anti-Defamation League found female officials are _3.4 times more likely_ to receive online harassment than their male counterparts. And it’s not just digital threats, either. In the past few years we’ve witnessed a violent intruder show up to Nancy Pelosi’s home with rope, zip ties, and a hammer; a man with a gun stalk Pramila Jayapal outside her house; and a thwarted plot to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer. **Then there’s what happened to me: A coordinated cyber-attack by far-right political operatives and media outlets meant to shame me out of office. ** After the attack on her husband, Nancy Pelosi said she was worried it would discourage other women from running for office. That’s something I worried about, too — and it’s not unfounded. When we say women running for office need extra support, we mean **every** type of support. There are so many invisible challenges and dangers that come with being a woman in politics, and that’s why I started HER Time: To help women overcome them. [**But I can’t do it alone. So I’m counting on you, Peter, to help me support women running for office with a donation of any amount today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74890321/442971810/1214735454?recurring=on&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231209_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjAyYzZmZWQtZjQ5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4FCv8zpNZ9tvAdCDnQW_JobnapdhhnZtHSPyk7w8-Ck=) _Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | [CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74890322/442971811/1214735454?recurring=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231209_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjAyYzZmZWQtZjQ5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4FCv8zpNZ9tvAdCDnQW_JobnapdhhnZtHSPyk7w8-Ck=)

name: Debbie (personal)
subject: Team, it's official:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
We've proved them wrong.
| | |
---
Team, it's official: 2024 is less than a month away. It's hard to believe how fast the first couple of months of this campaign have flown by — and how much we've accomplished in that time.
**Before this campaign enters high gear in 2024, I want to take a moment to reflect on everything that we've accomplished and personally thank you for being one of my earliest supporters.[(If you're short on time, thank you for all that you've done. We've got a long road ahead of us, and I need reliable people like you by my side. Will you chip in a donation here to keep our campaign on track for victory?)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74891177/442986556/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjlmNTZjM2MtZmE5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WrLeyuRSIlt0lR00jnkfbojtnCyoSqfADClpuKlJekk=)**
Just a few months ago, there were plenty of people out there who wrote off Florida. They never imagined that so many people would rally against Rick Scott. They never imagined that a grassroots team could outraise a _megamillionaire._ They never imagined that we could make this race a statistical tie and one of the most likely seats to flip blue in 2024.
_But we've proved them wrong._**Because, in this country, if you believe enough, if you work hard enough, and if you have enough courage, you can do what some might believe is impossible.** It's a lesson I've learned over and over again — in the stories I've heard from families across Florida and in my own life.
I came to America as a 14-year-old immigrant from Ecuador. My family lived in a one room apartment, my mom worked double shifts, and I found a minimum wage job to help pay the bills. Achieving our American dream wasn't easy. But eventually, I was able to give back to my community and serve Florida as the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress.
My family's story is one of courage. It’s a story of hardwork, perseverance, and an unwavering belief in what is possible in this country. And it's a story that I share with millions of Americans.
Anything is possible in America if you're willing to fight for it. _That's why I know that we're going to win in 2024_. The incredible people who make up this team — people like you, friend — have proven that they'll never give up. **We won't rest until we've defeated Rick Scott, maintained our Senate Majority, and restored the promise of America that he's worked so hard to undermine.**
Thank you so much for being one of the very first people to believe in my campaign. Now, as 2023 comes to a close, it's up to us to continue this fight into the election year. We'll only defeat Rick Scott if we keep this momentum going. That's why I have to ask once again:
**[If you have anything extra to spare, will you make a donation right now to power our campaign into 2024 so that we have the resources to defeat Rick Scott? We can win, but only if we stand united, every single step of the way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74891178/442986557/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjlmNTZjM2MtZmE5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WrLeyuRSIlt0lR00jnkfbojtnCyoSqfADClpuKlJekk=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74891179/442986558/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjlmNTZjM2MtZmE5Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WrLeyuRSIlt0lR00jnkfbojtnCyoSqfADClpuKlJekk=)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley could never understand the Missouri I grew up in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley could never understand the Missouri I grew up in.
**Please let me explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39644?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9)
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39644?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39644?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39644?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39644?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a US Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39644?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39645?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39645?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39645?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39645?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39645?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39645?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39644?refcode=em20231209-4352&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9)
---
If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thanks for all your help,
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231209-4352-footer&t=14&refcode2=4352_614464_oLl2-9&akid=4352%2E614464%2EoLl2-9)**

It’s not enough to have President Trump back in the White House - we need to build a Senate Majority that can put his plans into action. But right now, with Democrats sitting on MAJOR fundraising hauls, Republicans are in serious trouble. This campaign is rooted in lifting up New Mexicans, supporting workers and families, and protecting our planet for future generations. Your grassroots donation represents a future where Social Security and Medicare are protected and expanded, clean energy helps power our homes and economy, reproductive rights are enshrined in federal law, and our children and grandchildren enjoy the air, land, and water we helped preserve. Any amount you can give today will also help our campaign as we prepare to defend Martin’s seat in New Mexico and our Democratic Senate Majority. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12018%2E878179%2EwzDpmB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12018%2E878179%2EwzDpmB).**

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztb16fvoqg44dl3h7ukei930vt2artmolrnb9cvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g64ob4cth2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ht2asp4eu5q9screvj8785dghipmk56r00p420_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g64ob4cth2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdvllm46mknmk1k2pr9992plpijldg2parmsq998_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g64ob4cth2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgect599787kqidr7pinqbhbicl6alvgd7cvi6e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g64ob4cth2bs)

Plans for our future

Friend,

Are you ready to return to the days when America was **STRONG** and **PROUD?**

Are you ready to return to leadership without the drama and without the chaos?

_**Are you ready to elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track?**_

**[I have a plan to save our country, and I shared that plan on the debate stage. But I need your help to spread my message further than ever before. Once you finish looking over my plan as president, I am humbly asking you to pitch in a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmaa8oo3qkgt73ohamae82jo78sp7vbuv96v3l6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g64ob4cth2bs "I have a plan to save our country, and I shared that plan on the debate stage. But I need your help to spread my message further than ever before. Once you finish looking over my plan as president, I am humbly asking you to pitch in a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today.")**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zslrq4rr2kg92rv3ark2rd5nmkfu5st4lu96ij00_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g64ob4cth2bs)
---

_**When it comes to our economy,**_ if 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards!

_**Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America,**_ let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist.

We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels.

**When it comes to education, there should be complete transparency in the classroom.** You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening!

**We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again!** In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let's put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America.

**When it comes to our universities, we 'll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over.** We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all.

**When it comes to crime, it's simple:** Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals.

_**We will bring law and order back!**_

_**When it comes to energy independence**_ , no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let's make sure we do things so that __**it 's our American producers**__ supplying __**our American families. **__

_**When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us!**_ Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies!

**When I am president, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America! **

We have the solutions. But I need your help to win so we can get to work and right this ship!

**[Will you please pitch in a generous donation today so we can capitalize on our momentum from the FOURTH debate, and take one step closer to WINNING the battle for our country's future?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcqcrr6d7egt7sd07or6vbgnml8pl4qi7qv5u418_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g64ob4cth2bs "Will you please pitch in a generous donation today so we can capitalize on our momentum from the FOURTH debate, and take one step closer to WINNING the battle for our country’s future?")**

| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj32cg3jtgf0vq8t295c3oashjfn9p4ufcbti9ko_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g64ob4cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt5l3qjcis11imhe88do6kfe5bpdubbihbp9r3v8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g64ob4cth2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Solar generators are a smart choice %recipient.md5hash% FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Plans for our future | | | | | | Friend, Are you ready to return to the days when America was STRONG and PROUD? Are you ready to return to leadership without the drama and without the chaos? Are you ready to elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track? "I have a plan to save our country, and I shared that plan on the debate stage. But I need your help to spread my message further than ever before. Once you finish looking over my plan as president, I am humbly asking you to pitch in a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today." | When it comes to our economy, if 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards! Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America, let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist. We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels. When it comes to education, there should be complete transparency in the classroom. You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening! We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again! In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let's put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America. When it comes to our universities, we 'll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over. We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all. When it comes to crime, it's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals. We will bring law and order back! When it comes to energy independence , no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let's make sure we do things so that it 's our American producers supplying our American families. When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us! Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies! When I am president, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America! We have the solutions. But I need your help to win so we can get to work and right this ship! "Will you please pitch in a generous donation today so we can capitalize on our momentum from the FOURTH debate, and take one step closer to WINNING the battle for our country’s future?" | | We've got a country to save, Friend. "Will you help me save her?" My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37603%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h3XaJ96Xv1MUAixxYJ%2f8vg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37604%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iylflmMtW34%2bl%2byd53XvKg&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37615%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cv9HRCCHXzg%2bvIZgbwFLFg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37616%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LNHL4hitfQOccnu05y30og&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjq30bpkh2o0l518ga2s9nbjs9864oh79cjjc890_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36chh2bs)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuqk189fhdfq2t4p93caqemqcqfg0ac24ovpqki0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36chh2bs)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5t3b9ua4qlpkqe1snemggvchr0s0jr44p43nueo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36chh2bs).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: American Briefing
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zalbjd80u4tj6nniajqh9jv323pr3i47a8fg1r78_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk1jgvrv6r3imo8480j1suki896vnc4b1ka1em58_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36cjh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqc9hkt5iav4odr2igfhuemeoaj4e2857b8uo38g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpfu43qducgobt8pdpiqmo12uk7r8r48n1fruva0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---

name: American Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686253%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GK3H7s0dPNcBStI7Wmhn8Q&sysid=1)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686254%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7I3F4SGXb7BmrJD6MCxpVA&sysid=1)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686265%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iqVaLQuKLD4zAj4Wd8QecQ&sysid=1)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686265%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iqVaLQuKLD4zAj4Wd8QecQ&sysid=1)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

name: ICYMI News
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs2r6e611kh9v8nbkgopcoi336h0fess26i0puu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36chh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr979lva9mot91t3nhai71m4bgp5j54htba36phg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36chh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z40q33n3hpseos1apu4c1f8vbc2lrg5pvgbd3pg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36chh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo5d3g9isal0rve6eo9hdmga8ni2mrtbafghnjs8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36chh2bs)
---

---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znr61a9udb6smekkcmguiett85ko18njbnh4drv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze50ee4ljr7pi8gk607oe5ui7og7hhmvransiabo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36c5h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znsphq8rdgqbsv5ui52llqpkehm3f1fflic018sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zftep48jv5ca3omoocvaa94h8veo7snuegobutto_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g66o36c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Unveil the extraordinary leaders of military history in this free eBook
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrdvnv545qnpbrk1vmd57eifrprg5ectcvbsfcp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g69or2c5h2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2r0nkfqskuospk62o61euuh9tpfgnhnr5cnuoug_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g69or2c5h2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf4tjmbqhkqdu5coh3d68jkih8h940nfroeprd8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g69or2c5h2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqq34uov1dmv5ll5tlnucfo2hbvoqie13n3c5gc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g69or2c5h2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4paht44ebspck0nq2g31nd35nosgr4cgn0qsik0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g69or6c9h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuapqgiqls5gfalq09puj9eoquoaru2ujatevumo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g69or6c9h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z33c35jhih2k6fmu4tjff0n66q7m30ar4brvfmug_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g69or6c9h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf2v3dpgnfb9du7dr0nbf6aq62g9e47o29ui23sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9g69or6c9h2bs)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn9vsb6bbi0p09im0p1b3ihh1asi82aaq7phiik8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i6coj1chh2bs)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9f495b2tijko4rbdi0oc636m3scd396c84hk75o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i6coj1chh2bs)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfq6tprd6h54qcfo007r6kgc5sjl2i55pv76gc1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i6coj1chh2bs).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Pro Life Update
---

clean_body: With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever. | | | Hello Friend, I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional. This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support Pathway to Victory. With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever. One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures. | | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness. | | | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to Pathway to Victory today. Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year: -- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior. -- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit. -- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes. -- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together. And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the Proclaim the Gospel $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31. To support the work God is doing through Pathway to Victory , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: . With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional , a great Christmas gift for anyone! I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that. I'm very thankful for your friendship with Pathway to Victory. God bless you, Dr. Robert Jeffress Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcob1thvrpqlem96jht3jbl84iq9es5oqkm7132g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i6coj1c1h2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I write to you today with a sense of urgency because our nation's core values of faith, liberty, community, and life are under threat.

There have been countless stories recently that have raised my concerns about the ability to live out my faith in a public setting. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7n99im8e8sqnkbuohgt3c4vnjkb5thuldr5h7a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i6coj1c1h2bs) For example, a high school football coach lost his job for the simple act of praying on the field, and a Colorado baker who faced repeated legal battles for refusing to compromise his religious beliefs. These cases are just the tip of the iceberg, highlighting a growing trend of legal persecution against those who wish to live according to their faith.

[**It's becoming increasingly challenging for Americans to freely live out their faith, and I believe it's time for us to make our voices heard.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zip8r625fjii6ptnv00cd15qkad28aa7kp03f14g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i6coj1c1h2bs)

But here's the good news: Thousands of like-minded Americans have already joined us in this critical fight to safeguard religious freedom in America. They've voiced their concerns, shared their experiences, and taken a quick 2-minute survey on religious liberty in our country.

Now, I need you to add your voice to this growing chorus of defenders of faith and freedom. By participating in this survey, you're not just one among many--you're part of a movement, a powerful force united in our commitment to preserve the foundations of our great nation.

You can take the survey now using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb9nkp1ihluk24kere1gnvv8jpr0cfulk5k43dgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i6coj1c1h2bs)

Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.

[Will you join the **thousands** who have already completed the survey and help us strengthen our collective voice?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb8ssqafqmlslkfr01fntiuh9eivgg39vms49ijg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i6coj1c1h2bs)

In unity, we become an unstoppable force in upholding the freedoms that define America.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

GOP Presidential

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Reminder: SECOND PLEA: We Need Your Help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
| | | |
---
VOLUNTEER NEWSLETTER

WE NEED YOU!
Dear Peter,
Last week we sent you a message asking for help with campaign events. Meet and Greets are an essential part of Mark's campaign. Voters need to hear from Mark in person, and we need your help.
Here is the message from last week:
The 2024 election year is less than 30 days away. With early voting beginning May 25th, our campaign shifts into full gear in January.
We want to begin scheduling Meet & Greets with Mark in homes, clubhouses, coffee shops, or any place you can think of. It is a simple way to introduce Mark to potential voters.
The most successful Meet & Greets have multiple co-hosts. One person provides the place, with all other co-hosts inviting friends and neighbors. The format is simple. You and the co-hosts get the people there. Mark will make brief introductory comments, and then people can ask him any questions. Afterward, people can mingle and speak to Mark more informally. Refreshments are optional. Volunteers attend to help with the event.
Please reply to this message if you have questions. You can schedule the event on Mark's calendar using [this link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cQh414BKg43Bvl4mnMl5yjnYSm_0Whzts1hezrtdhH6K5EjnWDBjmnbA3WH7nu7bdIFxO8zPXCv9boNWMKMn8y06_SfNrx-bsY8RjlcYaSL41_4KO_a-7EaQiKmuyaHYZe0xwR6fZP_gVvnROQqOJ94CCeqcNCl8F6ESG2AxSOtcxjSlGmUMhhdYQRLLJmub&c=bxWEserooEoWeveWfriFuJNDgT2JulOgoqHGmWX84Vff0oa2FYnRoQ==&ch=Aih9g3NoQj13-FwxfWYJGLigrlr4l7BzIqjO5PWkH_oOrecUnWjCTQ==): [https://calendly.com/robertson-for-congress/meet-and-greet.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cQh414BKg43Bvl4mnMl5yjnYSm_0Whzts1hezrtdhH6K5EjnWDBjmhrD3vW-5h7soai_8qLeLwOdbxR7-ksPdUW6XazgzI0pM40b9zH7WB4NLtNAErVbK_T2tTC3qCKknFuL9kHKsPa47mYZJ6fYA9qnOqNH7FdBfUD8uWTGbXSdaFQVB1Fl0toCSUcgUjqBZEA8iFk9GVg=&c=bxWEserooEoWeveWfriFuJNDgT2JulOgoqHGmWX84Vff0oa2FYnRoQ==&ch=Aih9g3NoQj13-FwxfWYJGLigrlr4l7BzIqjO5PWkH_oOrecUnWjCTQ==)
This simple act on your part can make a big difference for our Nation. We need good, honest people like Colonel Mark Robertson Representing us in Washington, DC. Thank you for doing what you can!
Beth Weddle Communications Director Robertson For Congress

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Be Part of the Movement For Religious Liberty
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37621%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fjlcrD%2f4k3tmAhHEqUBz2Q&sysid=1)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I write to you today with a sense of urgency because our nation's core values of faith, liberty, community, and life are under threat.

There have been countless stories recently that have raised my concerns about the ability to live out my faith in a public setting. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37622%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MDGDl3w2VDVLKDfAeiITBg&sysid=1) For example, a high school football coach lost his job for the simple act of praying on the field, and a Colorado baker who faced repeated legal battles for refusing to compromise his religious beliefs. These cases are just the tip of the iceberg, highlighting a growing trend of legal persecution against those who wish to live according to their faith.

[**It's becoming increasingly challenging for Americans to freely live out their faith, and I believe it's time for us to make our voices heard.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37623%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wWupNA1rntk9st7ORkw8%2bQ&sysid=1)

But here's the good news: Thousands of like-minded Americans have already joined us in this critical fight to safeguard religious freedom in America. They've voiced their concerns, shared their experiences, and taken a quick 2-minute survey on religious liberty in our country.

Now, I need you to add your voice to this growing chorus of defenders of faith and freedom. By participating in this survey, you're not just one among many--you're part of a movement, a powerful force united in our commitment to preserve the foundations of our great nation.

You can take the survey now using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37624%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jqMA3RatbGI95KRdH51Kww&sysid=1)

Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.

[Will you join the **thousands** who have already completed the survey and help us strengthen our collective voice?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37635%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fydOvSJZRTjPsBSQUPtqtw&sysid=1)

In unity, we become an unstoppable force in upholding the freedoms that define America.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zltr2re2btdr99c11db27cgifaolucnd9ec2blh0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i66o76c1h2bs)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc0o7dngqj98h3cm133ro0rj7igg7fdnkn7omdmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i66o76c1h2bs)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7lnblm3o295u5v6jn2ahfn6c8tf58u4hnpr7iuo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32c9i66o76c1h2bs).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XRzHBf8e-Pr-OxGemD4Wew~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWCegP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjMxMjEwVwNzcGNCCmVz-oh1ZVfKPzdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures...
