Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1d931b7ae75447479f2a0129bd35a58c&_e=P9x1sIi_F4hHfzd8J09cmiGPnV_4d9nGX5MaFjyCdsNtLYqoqI05Pz0sNaXJzYK7jTt5vso0RfaL6zyaRgZjnnq0avKYgdSisVq2kxSABk6BEylmvxm2H6C65wL0RdfycKPCwRiMTa1e_6V1XUA7TkZSqnnQ3q11RqPWexbl2liGKP-UnO_6_A5INu45jnF7vbHEHMRYEf5Y0nRuGGHLOzsmIBbWZmq1vc6s0EAujPTsaSX1S9BkLuqE9EwTQVORJkuT73verELWopT1oyw3194tIl0_Fp-jgw9zbWNwmVObzZf2YRkCnbvrTelNANvx0r4iX3nANxE1Mmb_IfPU5PdXMh-XmiCtBhOj886dqP8qb8WlQKNbOQs-4oe3mM_m)

____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.

-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Holiday message from Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=af85f9ab6194e73ff98c33caa0d128867fb741ff5e506cb825000b4affbbb3170cf7afb69a1cb7bf4ade21c7bbcac920404a900ac3bc16cfde069e0c200099c26dc88ed07d0f8396a9abf222abacefcf

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d008229ed28934505b5ba82072039c340f22a228cf9068e7802049836a75f62bb4fffa558f54323103992fabba80187df76a4cf6445fcae55d0fa7c51217b0cb

Are you getting in the holiday spirit, friend?

Our team is. Ron DeSantis is more excited than ever to kick off election year and get this country's comeback started, but we can't slow down in the meantime!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d008229ed28934505b5ba82072039c340f22a228cf9068e7802049836a75f62bb4fffa558f54323103992fabba80187df76a4cf6445fcae55d0fa7c51217b0cb
Hear Ron DeSantis' message!

It's been a long road already, but we've got a long road ahead. Every minute of fighting will be worth it when we save this country. Don't just take it from us—
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d008229ed28934505b5ba82072039c340f22a228cf9068e7802049836a75f62bb4fffa558f54323103992fabba80187df76a4cf6445fcae55d0fa7c51217b0cb
Ron DeSantis left you this message about keeping up the effort through the holidays!

Sincerely,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d008229ed28934505b5ba82072039c340f22a228cf9068e7802049836a75f62bb4fffa558f54323103992fabba80187df76a4cf6445fcae55d0fa7c51217b0cb

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d008229ed2893450365df8416763b99018f7f99a8665f37bcdf9c50652d55283a1f889c90223213cea3bbf291a51c4987a5e7508ce4bda340f1b8948d7b2863a
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d008229ed28934505b5ba82072039c340f22a228cf9068e7802049836a75f62bb4fffa558f54323103992fabba80187df76a4cf6445fcae55d0fa7c51217b0cb

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d008229ed28934505b5ba82072039c340f22a228cf9068e7802049836a75f62bb4fffa558f54323103992fabba80187df76a4cf6445fcae55d0fa7c51217b0cb

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Are you getting in the holiday spirit, friend? Our team is. Ron DeSantis is more excited than ever to kick off election year and get this country's comeback started, but we can't slow down in the meantime! Hear Ron DeSantis' message! It's been a long road already, but we've got a long road ahead. Every minute of fighting will be worth it when we save this country. Don't just take it from us— Ron DeSantis left you this message about keeping up the effort through the holidays! Sincerely, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Inslee's ongoing scandal
body:
With the holidays quickly approaching, the days are getting a little busier - in a good way, we hope. And, as always, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest this week from your own backyard. Read on...

Friends,

We hope you enjoyed the final Pac-12 football championship game with your friends and family, and can now look forward to the University of Washington representing our state in the Sugar Bowl on New Year's Day (if you're into that kind of thing). Now the holidays
are truly going full steam. And, as always, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest this week from your own backyard. Read on…

This week's Newsmaker Interview…
Shift's Newsmaker Interview featured Jennifer Sey, former Levi Strauss & Co. executive and author of "Levi's Unbuttoned: The Woke Mob Took My Job but Gave Me My Voice." Sey, a speaker at the 2024 Roanoke Conference, discussed her concerns about the impact of
distance learning on students' education and social development. In the interview, she shared her experiences from the COVID pandemic, including her fight against activists attempting to silence her concerns and the challenges she faced within Levi's when advocating for reopening public schools.
Sey also previewed her upcoming documentary, "GENERATION COVID," which explores the long-term effects of COVID lockdowns on children. Read more.

This week's top story…
Given the numerous instances of scandal within Washington state government that Shift has covered throughout Governor Jay Inslee's almost 11-year tenure, it was only a matter of time before an insider exposed real corruption. Our Friday Daily Briefing focused on
investigative reporter Susannah Frame's revelations, despite objections from the governor's office to withhold information until they have covered up what they need to. The Inslee administration's clumsy attempt to halt KING 5's reporting on the true cost of the Jay Inslee's carbon tax has
backfired, as a former state economist has filed a legal claim alleging retaliation for refusing to conceal the tax's true impact. The 35-year employee claims his career was ruined for refusing to lie about the new state policy, after he did the "6th grade math" showing it would increase pump
prices by 45 to 50 cents per gallon in early 2023 - as turned out to be the case, much the chagrin of Democrats trying to cover that up. Read this story and more.

In case you missed it…
This week, Shift alerted our readers to leaked court documents revealing secret negotiations between the Biden Administration, Washington state, and extreme environmental groups to dismantle the four Lower Snake River dams, raising concerns about Eastern
Washington's economy. A Seattle Times report provided detailed information, including a proposal for a Pacific Northwest Tribal Energy Program to replace dam services with "clean, renewable socially-just energy resources." Absent from the negotiations were considerations of "reliability" and
"affordability," suggesting a prioritization of Gov. Inslee and the Democrats' pursuit of "socially-just energy" at the potential expense of taxpayer dollars and higher consumer prices. Read this story and more.

Your bit of inspiration for the week…

Take a moment to enjoy the Pacific Northwest in the winter, captured by former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler.

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

name: National Gun Owner
subject: We paid for this already
body:
Grab your Complimentary Shoulder Holster now, before it’s too late.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3687/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/161031f38b1608aa73340db4977e61792b60cba7) here at any time. December 10th, 2023 \- Breaking News - Firearms Reviews - 2nd Amendment - Ammo & More -. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | \- We’re happy to tell you **we’ve paid the Full Price** of American Tactical Supply’s new “invisible” Shoulder Holster for you.

So you can own one of the 382 available Shoulder Holsters for FREE!

[Just click here to claim your complimentary Shoulder Holster today.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3687/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/161031f38b1608aa73340db4977e61792b60cba7)

We’re doing this as a **“No More Gun Control”** awareness campaign -- and to give a __big ol’ middle finger__ to Biden’s surge of insane new gun laws.

This is our #1 favorite holster.

It fits nearly all handguns...

It’s unbelievably comfortable...

And it’s so good at concealing guns... it can make a large frame pistol **disappear in plain sight.**

Plus, the fact you can get it for $0.00 today is a huge selling point. ;)

The only problem is that there are a limited number available to give away.

Once they’re gone, you can still get one... **but you’ll have to pay full price**.

Right now, there are enough Free Shoulder Holsters [for the next 382 people who request on here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3687/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/161031f38b1608aa73340db4977e61792b60cba7).

After that, we can’t make any promises.

**So HURRY and grab your Free Shoulder Holster now** , before it’s too late.

**Thank You.**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=617a30ad7aac403aa9f2175efc9345a9&_e=e5eXJHYa2bsiyWJYY0cd_q7Ptk-X9uJTiWYT-J6HxD0EBp-oJuhqAOfVzBuqAgiS3RV8I3aG5rIF-nZmZJqh1sfgwLsXuQrhdkOigywuN3v7V33oCDTVyreIBfq9srBLbjNQZ6NUHr6DPYrbYXs8OhKRnKb7QDJPzwu36hQsQ4ZE4x8n-a1NZkJugYI25jB8Yxq_BSXSDt2CFf9SLYV3L4y0n2b9CG8phR5-T4RNZXNl8Dgq4sxCFumtLoZ1dgJa33nTq-PACKwywOji9D6wUgDX3Aksa-XJ8vlKE0cr-S5C2qXnD3RrE6aZakt6ea9qQ1dkIIQ_IJrYHIiqEtAa_LzZO61Ld8urWA1w0IsVYGw8IwsmOu5Pt0p_SvJG1lKB)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=617a30ad7aac403aa9f2175efc9345a9&_e=e5eXJHYa2bsiyWJYY0cd_q7Ptk-X9uJTiWYT-J6HxD0EBp-oJuhqAOfVzBuqAgiS3RV8I3aG5rIF-nZmZJqh1sfgwLsXuQrhdkOigywuN3v7V33oCDTVyreIBfq9srBLbjNQZ6NUHr6DPYrbYXs8OhKRnKb7QDJPzwu36hQsQ4ZE4x8n-a1NZkJugYI25jB8Yxq_BSXSDt2CFf9SLYV3L5LKmKtTZO_-otF1tCnlxnaz6UXK9NzDm97XClzteuFSd58MldnNqW2GSpvGc6L_yPvYkNMDOaJG9vuaU75I35pGluwdlid46iAL_FMw7L0dBa63CXQEnfMpCok0g2kT9MvpNGmhZJsoVOqCsi6Qmx5vJL2efN7CSuhJYwmIor8l)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=617a30ad7aac403aa9f2175efc9345a9&_e=e5eXJHYa2bsiyWJYY0cd_q7Ptk-X9uJTiWYT-J6HxD0EBp-oJuhqAOfVzBuqAgiS3RV8I3aG5rIF-nZmZJqh1sfgwLsXuQrhdkOigywuN3v7V33oCDTVyreIBfq9srBLbjNQZ6NUHr6DPYrbYXs8OhKRnKb7QDJPzwu36hQsQ4ZE4x8n-a1NZkJugYI25jB8Yxq_BSXSDt2CFf9SLYV3L79zbWH3_kLlC08w99HBn6xFcP-Zt7hhTTZiUQRJtX_mh5JcOu2_zsTnNckYFTNb0KYTF-TTur-u_J2FM2cuszwdZTTocKNy5VVO7YYax35sJxfhwVOgDmKeUYRu-pbpquRT-CVGQBTPIeXSwkMTRPDIJ0m5m1xsoZZYOKsPtfC0).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

---

clean_body: With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever. | | | __ Hello Friend, I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional. This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support Pathway to Victory. With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever. One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures. | | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness. | | | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to Pathway to Victory today. Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year: -- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior. -- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit. -- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes. -- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together. And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the Proclaim the Gospel $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31. To support the work God is doing through Pathway to Victory , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: . With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional , a great Christmas gift for anyone! I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that. I'm very thankful for your friendship with Pathway to Victory. God bless you, Dr. Robert Jeffress Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: Trump’s Secret: “Food Rations Start Friday”
body:
Beijing's long anticipated assault on America isn't an EMP...

It isn't a nuclear attack.

It isn't a chemical attack.

And it isn't another virus.

According to war hero, white house insider, and purple heart recipient Teddy Daniels - this attack is a "new kind of warfare" that will "starve America into submission".

Listen up... Teddy Daniels is not only a man that I trust - he's a man I have tremendous admiration for.

And Mr. Daniels has just released an [EMERGENCY DOCUMENTARY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YbweFFdRm_kWld55aBLfwA~~/AARclAA~~) that not only proves America is on the cusp of the greatest food shortage in recorded history...

But reveals rock solid evidence that this "Final Famine" could start on Friday.

Plus, in Mr. Daniels' shocking documentary, you'll also discover:
*Why Every Patriot MUST HAVE 3 Feet of Copper Wire In Their Home, To Be Properly Prepared For This "Final Famine"
*How An Accused Spy In Our Government (Codenamed: "The Red Dragon") Has Paved The Way For This Food Shortage. Plus Her Secret Identity Exposed!
*What President Trump whispered to Teddy in their secret meeting - and why it means that Stockpiling Food Won't Save You or Your Family...
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YbweFFdRm_kWld55aBLfwA~~/AARclAA~~)
Watch Teddy Daniels' EXPLOSIVE documentary right now - because folks, this is NOT a drill.
As you might know, I consider myself to be a man who can survive almost anything.

But the deadly evidence Mr. Daniels presents, and the incredibly unique nature of this threat... even has ME afraid.

Afraid for my family. Afraid for my friends. And afraid for YOU.

More urgently, when you [watch Teddy's EMERGENCY documentary right now](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YbweFFdRm_kWld55aBLfwA~~/AARclAA~~) - you'll immediately realize that his report will be deleted by the powers that be as soon as they become aware of it.

Watch it now please.

Paul Grabowski

American Freedom Report

and I took him to the border

It's Elon Musk.
Earlier this year I took him to the border to show him the disastrous state that Biden has left it in.

And in his words: "This sounds like complete madness".

He couldn't be any closer to the truth.

This is Representative Tony Gonzales.

Since 2022, over 7,000,000 illegal immigrants have entered our country, and Democrats would LOVE to see it continue.

They'd love it so much that they've raised over $71 MILLION to crush Republicans' chances of maintaining the house in 2024.

With such a slim majority in the House, we CANNOT afford to fall behind.

It's hard of me to ask, but can you chip in just $5 to help Republicans maintain our house majority?
| [ **HELP SECURE THE MAJORITY: CHIP IN $5** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24a15f1e7b7c4cf8ac77230a2d751075&_e=p0kIgYS_PSzydH2AM5q0A6F1CLl19G_o_hiY8A6bfHrvgN-qCeN7N1Rwuo27FGmGl64rSfiZMoeQoseJdm6EfTtRvAK9ZczYdV29Yr9mKJ02bYS2aBupuAuFaP-tJB2iJy1dzQ0gXKa7Vfr4n1YXpY-j3G-M6LE9vSX_BtVjPxgMGhokW6FRX0ZXXIm3OeXVDufd-SQg3Kv2E2fkqpoeeBkJ_Hfxcg2iR19CtXclRRK7BGq3lzOGShlrCiGigii4DaMoyjmqck7wbpt8QLx8ZpeUxie5aW4SdjJYQ7sa1ZSWiet1e2EsHqUajPihGz9PFO-uXCMnv8XXv45GxK1gy53Nper68sKzIKcI7ZIy1obztFeR6yGn_QJBAJiLVe81Nfdb_cw9klcovAj8dP-aph0AaO-y6nZ6WjIxLmyZSACmyeeuvT3SS7hvd0dDBMS_fShF4uldTUyjsuHaT8h_kHTUyWW15Q8rE9nlP9dqBIM%3D)
---
Our southern border is just another prime example of Democrat incompetence, and if they have their way our entire COUNTRY will be look just like the border.

Please don't let that happen, John.

Can I count on you?

body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a088e55e50514be482810b348a3d12d6&_e=szb0Ky6AScz3L1fVMBOHEVO3qIQnMUqs0gEj-DP4Sd272XByhYveVeDz-GuWfBL8SveBN0hgeKsUj5xEPSKmhC_Hp8pFNUxpPAqQ57wnTBWhTF6LEn9XSmQjBuVs_4eFiW08CkS_Rg2KnLJZOAe8XxyCQQgbU3km2PYI-qr6In9lJLmxlgoCqnW7g0kwf0LL9CoI7Pf7M2gCF0S7Uv4snrReZmnZyIS3EF5YjcFOF9nUEYugvRQRwtVVa9meCItsZZ8S5VSlkPDvPZEfpM7QmSn_hjZS0aM9QfV2iuGBQyrsz6DKr8PI7DLsd4RJKuvvvqSvAyFNvAoAe6SdQ8eCmbQ_zenMlO2rx6s5ZkGzP0unh8kz0BayXgofLdZlarBmd4f_0VOW2NJsg77CIk6MSWPEbkUyUtKhcxeYonJwL46qVZ650Zb2ZItDRgH-DX5J)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a088e55e50514be482810b348a3d12d6&_e=szb0Ky6AScz3L1fVMBOHEVO3qIQnMUqs0gEj-DP4Sd272XByhYveVeDz-GuWfBL8SveBN0hgeKsUj5xEPSKmhC_Hp8pFNUxpPAqQ57wnTBWhTF6LEn9XSmQjBuVs_4eFiW08CkS_Rg2KnLJZOAe8XxyCQQgbU3km2PYI-qr6In9lJLmxlgoCqnW7g0kwf0LL9CoI7Pf7M2gCF0S7Uv4snrReZmnZyIS3EF5YjcFOF9nUEYugvRQRwtVVa9meCItsZZ8S5VSlkPDvPZEfpM7QmYy950mPMYfEGdkjkoixZTYyuOAaMaqlLHGQ1jFeePPPnOTLPtZhjEV0qw79ckFin2JiKclwlbD2WUViQqSg-0oWNDYnveVTygOfm7VNCT9Vem_X9fH4C48ArU1FJirlVo-Alycpbkq8tEVgpDM8S72sOWbsN-XbkJjQdzXYMG76)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a088e55e50514be482810b348a3d12d6&_e=szb0Ky6AScz3L1fVMBOHEVO3qIQnMUqs0gEj-DP4Sd272XByhYveVeDz-GuWfBL8SveBN0hgeKsUj5xEPSKmhC_Hp8pFNUxpPAqQ57wnTBWhTF6LEn9XSmQjBuVs_4eFiW08CkS_Rg2KnLJZOAe8XxyCQQgbU3km2PYI-qr6In9lJLmxlgoCqnW7g0kwf0LL9CoI7Pf7M2gCF0S7Uv4snrReZmnZyIS3EF5YjcFOF9nUEYugvRQRwtVVa9meCItsZZ8S5VSlkPDvPZEfpM7QmZ-gWwHIgY4x4P1j7iKiuO1JwuASph1aye07TwstHgfb-F0bH3auYxhq6h1VwoVglGpWt3hVRW1Bi1a-AnHSvpy_nnTo1W4jOrNqF_XgjANmIUldIULNv3LmXqZJB0_K44Jqv0v2XEz8kgijbwMldiDroH9o5amJafx4rDQWguy7)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a088e55e50514be482810b348a3d12d6&_e=szb0Ky6AScz3L1fVMBOHEVO3qIQnMUqs0gEj-DP4Sd272XByhYveVeDz-GuWfBL8SveBN0hgeKsUj5xEPSKmhC_Hp8pFNUxpPAqQ57wnTBWhTF6LEn9XSmQjBuVs_4eFiW08CkS_Rg2KnLJZOAe8XxyCQQgbU3km2PYI-qr6In9lJLmxlgoCqnW7g0kwf0LL9CoI7Pf7M2gCF0S7Uv4snrReZmnZyIS3EF5YjcFOF9nUEYugvRQRwtVVa9meCItsZZ8S5VSlkPDvPZEfpM7QmSYO_3vMYooakqWBWFiomWXpr89KjqTxCypjuktje_OAlTna49Hex5vJVO0XE4TaLNrm_US170TL7xAH5RwzsHwE5_MfakbXePlJIFUFfMR_0zZpEcl5Gp8ihOEVcguTXQIa9V-Jm1pPj6aHR4ySG2KrDgUQRa-SSsfrHJYCJgfG).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb131ccde-0af6-4db7-84b0-ba6714034807/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

| | | | | **Peter, Georgia Republicans just released their plan to kick me out of Congress. In a blatant attempt to make me lose my seat, they redrew the district I represent to be over 20 points Republican.** My worst fears have unfortunately been confirmed. The GOP has shown they’ll do anything and everything in their power to force me out of the Capitol. [**Here’s where things stand: I have to be as prepared as possible while this works its way through the legal system. We’re working on raising another $15k in the next week to show that our grassroots movement won’t stand for these cheap tactics. Can you contribute a split donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action ASAP?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04feff18-4aa6-4388-a497-f60ddef92dc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| In 2021, Republicans tried to gerrymander me for the first time. My supporters stood beside me and I returned to Congress despite the GOP’s best efforts. **But because of a court case, Georgia Republicans are now working to redraw the maps AGAIN, and they’ve chosen to target me for the second time in three years.** I need to know you have my back right now, team. The fate of the gun safety movement I’ve been leading in Washington D.C. depends on our ability to fight back. [**Help us hit our $15k goal right now by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Blue Amp Action. I promise I won’t stop fighting for you in Congress, but I need your help to get there.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44f6679c-0c25-4845-90a6-4e88c659fc7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. clean_body: 🚨BREAKING: Maps have been released | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can . | | | | | | | | Peter, Georgia Republicans just released their plan to kick me out of Congress. In a blatant attempt to make me lose my seat, they redrew the district I represent to be over 20 points Republican. My worst fears have unfortunately been confirmed. The GOP has shown they’ll do anything and everything in their power to force me out of the Capitol. | | | | | | | | In 2021, Republicans tried to gerrymander me for the first time. My supporters stood beside me and I returned to Congress despite the GOP’s best efforts. But because of a court case, Georgia Republicans are now working to redraw the maps AGAIN, and they’ve chosen to target me for the second time in three years. I need to know you have my back right now, team. The fate of the gun safety movement I’ve been leading in Washington D.C. depends on our ability to fight back. | | | | | | | | | | | We're in this together, Lucy McBath | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PhePwCqVVRQ2eiUBaQB3Vw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWGziP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIxMCZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZXNlwXVldvVpD1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PhePwCqVVRQ2eiUBaQB3Vw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWGziP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIxMCZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZXNlwXVldvVpD1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: THREE important milestones
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We measured everything in the Marines.
#

Peter:
We measured everything in the Marines. Distance to the enemy. Rounds in your magazine. Time until you go home.
We do that on campaigns, too. And I wanted to bring three important milestones to your attention — dates we’re keeping track of.
**_October 10, 2023:**_ Two months ago today. That was the day Kari Lake announced her campaign. When she got in this race it upped the ante immediately. Since then, this race has been about more than a seat in the Senate. It’s about stopping someone who is a real threat to the Constitution that I swore to defend when I joined the Marines.
**_December 10, 2023:**_ That’s today. An important day just on its own. Because today, I’m asking you to make your first online donation to my campaign.
We’re coming up on the most important deadline of this campaign so far.
**_December 31, 2023:**_ Three weeks from today. Our final FEC deadline of the year. Everything we’ve raised in 2023, the number of donations we’ve received, all of it will go public. When our report is released everyone will see if this campaign has what it takes to beat Kari Lake.
It’s going to take all of us coming together, going the extra mile, to hit our goal. Our last goal before we go into 2024 and enter the most important election cycle of our lifetimes.
[**So please, let today be the day that you make your first online contribution to my campaign for Senate in Arizona. I can’t do this without your help. Really.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231210-1&t=1&akid=1534%2E734936%2EZNpEPN)

If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=26&akid=1534%2E734936%2EZNpEPN). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1534%2E734936%2EZNpEPN). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=1534_734936_ZNpEPN&akid=1534%2E734936%2EZNpEPN)
clean_body: We measured everything in the Marines. Peter: We measured everything in the Marines. Distance to the enemy. Rounds in your magazine. Time until you go home. We do that on campaigns, too. And I wanted to bring three important milestones to your attention — dates we’re keeping track of. October 10, 2023: Two months ago today. That was the day Kari Lake announced her campaign. When she got in this race it upped the ante immediately. Since then, this race has been about more than a seat in the Senate. It’s about stopping someone who is a real threat to the Constitution that I swore to defend when I joined the Marines. December 10, 2023: That’s today. An important day just on its own. Because today, I’m asking you to make your first online donation to my campaign. We’re coming up on the most important deadline of this campaign so far. December 31, 2023: Three weeks from today. Our final FEC deadline of the year. Everything we’ve raised in 2023, the number of donations we’ve received, all of it will go public. When our report is released everyone will see if this campaign has what it takes to beat Kari Lake. It’s going to take all of us coming together, going the extra mile, to hit our goal. Our last goal before we go into 2024 and enter the most important election cycle of our lifetimes. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Proud to have you with me. Let’s finish this month strong. Semper Fi, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Matthew Lucci
subject: It's Official - We're on the Ballot!
body:
Last week, I went down to Austin to file for my place on the ballot for the
March 5th Republican Primary. I took pages including thousands of
signatures from across the district with me, marking the FIRST TIME EVER
that a candidate in Texas' 25th Congressional district has gathered
signatures from all 13 counties in the district. I also brought a check, in
case the signatures were challenged in court. The establishment knows all
the tricks, and they've been fighting to keep us off the ballot. But last
night, I got the news that our application had been approved, and we're on
the ballot
<https://candidate.texas-election.com/Elections/getQualifiedCandidatesInfo.do>
!

[image: IMG_4647.jpeg]

I've been very busy on the campaign trail, with so many great events in the
last few weeks. Here is just a quick sampling:

My wife and I watched the Cleburne Christmas parade with friends at the
Johnson County Republican Party HQ.

[image: IMG_1068.jpeg]

My team and I were featured in the 1st Annual Christmas parade in Godley.
We passed candy out to the kids and shook hands with the adults along the
parade route, before meeting Santa fo the Christmas tree lighting. I wonder
if I could get a formal endorsement from him?

[image: IMG_4556.jpeg]

I spoke with Sid Miller, our Commissioner of Agriculture, at a Christmas
party in Euless this last week. It's clear that the DC Establishment isn't
looking out for farmers and ranchers in Texas, and it's time for us to TAKE
OUR COUNTRY BACK.

[image: IMG_1099.jpeg]

I had the opportunity to speak for a minute at the Fort Worth Republican
Women Christmas party this past week. I spoke about the Congressional
Pledge to Fight Human Trafficking
<https://www.luccifortexas.com/_files/ugd/dfc27c_4f4d91a5be4b46e88208cfe479924730.pdf>
that I authored, and highlighted some of the great candidates, like John
O'Shea <https://oshea4texas.com/>, who have signed the pledge. The keynote
speaker was Jaco Booyens <https://jacobooyensministries.org/>, who has
dedicated his life to fighting human trafficking.

[image: d6c8e3c8-33f0-4708-9025-a8cd93f9e1ce.jpg]

There are many more vents to come, so keep an eye on the website
<https://www.luccifortexas.com/>! With less than three months before the
Republican primary, this is going to be the fight of our lives. Every bit
of help is needed, whether it's a donation
<https://secure.winred.com/lucci-for-congress/donate-today>, or volunteering
<https://www.luccifortexas.com/contact-me> to knock doors. We need to reach
voters across all 13 counties in our district and get them out to the polls
to TAKE OUR COUNTRY BACK!

God Bless You!
[image: Matthew Lucci Signature.png]

*PS- If you'd like to unsubscribe, just reply and let me know.*
--
*--*
*Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25*
Matthew@LucciForTexas <Matthew@LucciForTexas.com>
(682) 220-9925
*www.LucciForTexas.com <http://www.luccifortexas.com/>*

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f470dc2b4ba40f18056bc1a0b08985a&_e=YKnpofZcI_bnzCABEAfOwn_WIErLaGIO6etDGtuwqlGzNUGFvKIVzJLtRXhHO6YPHhUZFqGc4yiMgITMpbqEtvA8XiZa7hemKihrj8VWujFRFE0rZe77kP18R5Uf4VQ7s_r2H4s4XgjFXaQ7Ghv5OqUqHbe7IeGfQQn9FFv5UvWUU5O1Zp8V1A-WgRnJWS8iSQ6gW4JtYrA-Hk9xVRR2FaaZ-iFqa5UyOWFBcaPwA1iXPmennllWAKQ0WNk0WlvSJYUOUTVrpVFReHux8NSB6mu4ZBuYt6w3BkQ8bazQx9ogGj-adrDpOrml47uIyqPK0y-BQta0MHa7nmcPDODyP_c85sAZYQwO0StbSo-mPfJaJCzT-MAnPDtYCKkUqdvT)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f470dc2b4ba40f18056bc1a0b08985a&_e=YKnpofZcI_bnzCABEAfOwn_WIErLaGIO6etDGtuwqlGzNUGFvKIVzJLtRXhHO6YPHhUZFqGc4yiMgITMpbqEtvA8XiZa7hemKihrj8VWujFRFE0rZe77kP18R5Uf4VQ7s_r2H4s4XgjFXaQ7Ghv5OqUqHbe7IeGfQQn9FFv5UvWUU5O1Zp8V1A-WgRnJWS8iSQ6gW4JtYrA-Hk9xVRR2FZqo_xWNzRkmo9LqHfm_MKilkdToEBJ8RG1EK_KzZCS4W5WesSyj-ec1vocbuCzdN37Nlqb3UfFzg4Pn3f8fhHrbzk1twbJtIon0KPH6WXz10bWcjkoCbuzaIT2ZVPUDl3I44UZeX_yMgU75g24MDvRNkaUcFI-nsqmwnY86U0MZ)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

Which is why, this Christmas season, despite Crooked Joe and his accomplices attempts to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, enact the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family, and worst of all, NULLIFY YOUR VOTE by trying to remove my name from the 2024 ballot, my spirits have honestly never been higher! Because I have the support of the greatest grassroots movement in history, chock full of more than 74 MILLION patriots who will NEVER SURRENDER our country or our HOPE. And to show you just how much you mean to me and our movement, Friend, I’ve had a special Christmas gift made just for YOU – for FREE : | | Thank you, God bless you, and Merry Christmas! | Donald J. Trump 45th (and Future 47th) President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: personally asking for $10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=733%2E52803%2EcbGtMJ)

| | I hate bothering you, Peter, so I'm just going to jump right to it: **We’re only a few weeks away from our End of Year FEC deadline, and yet we’re well off the pace to hit our goal.[So, could you do me a HUGE favor and chip in just $10 to our Senate campaign before you close this email and forget it ever existed?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8504?t=9&amount=10&akid=733%2E52803%2EcbGtMJ)** | | | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8504?t=10&amount=10&akid=733%2E52803%2EcbGtMJ)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8504?t=11&amount=35&akid=733%2E52803%2EcbGtMJ)
---
Our Senate campaign here in Maryland is running up against a self-funded, multi-millionaire who has already invested** ___m_ _illions_ _of_ _dollars_** of his own money into his campaign.
So yes, it’s safe to say we have quite a bit of catching up to do when it comes to fundraising and keeping pace with the seemingly unlimited resources of our most serious opponent.
**But that’s OK, Peter.** Because when _this_ grassroots team comes together, we will outwork any wealthy millionaire who thinks they can just buy their way into the U.S. Senate.
**[So, what do you say, Peter? Can I count on you to donate just $10 to help our Senate campaign get back on track and spread our message to voters across Maryland?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8504?t=12&amount=10&akid=733%2E52803%2EcbGtMJ)**
| | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8504?t=13&amount=10&akid=733%2E52803%2EcbGtMJ)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8504?t=14&amount=35&akid=733%2E52803%2EcbGtMJ)
---
Thanks for your help, and happy Sunday!
—Angela

name: NextGen America
subject: We’re with the VP on this one
body:
Americans deserve better than abortion bans.

| | Team, the Texas abortion ban is so vile, even Vice President Harris had to weigh in. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74909351/443024964/339600077?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWNmZTkwZi02ZDk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FnKY1j5i9kfp_brlJDXR6yCwaNdSriG_ma4aY0qS5lo=&emci=35fcd68d-4395-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=cacfe90f-6d97-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74909352/443024965/339600077?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWNmZTkwZi02ZDk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FnKY1j5i9kfp_brlJDXR6yCwaNdSriG_ma4aY0qS5lo=&emci=35fcd68d-4395-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=cacfe90f-6d97-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6787172) But the truth is, Texas isn’t the only state that’s severely restricted abortion access. 21 states have banned abortion outright or restricted it earlier in pregnancy than the standard set by _Roe vs. Wade_. Americans deserve better than bans on bodily autonomy. | [I’m in: Join the fight →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74909354/443024967/-466968977?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWNmZTkwZi02ZDk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FnKY1j5i9kfp_brlJDXR6yCwaNdSriG_ma4aY0qS5lo=&emci=35fcd68d-4395-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=cacfe90f-6d97-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

Because of this, President Joe Biden has called on an assault weapons ban. This would ban assault-style rifles, such as the AR-15, that have been used in mass shootings for the past 20 years.

But Republican Speaker of the House Mike Johnson has yet to bring an assault weapons ban up for a vote, even in light of the growing number of mass shootings nationwide.

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=898%2E135344%2EztA-hU)

Hey there,
I know that when I send emails about how much money we have to raise and how expensive this race is going to be, it’s not always apparent how a $5 contribution can make a difference. But it’s true: donations to emails like this make up the majority of individual contributions to this campaign, and a full third of the money we raise every quarter.
But every dollar we raise is more than just a number in a spreadsheet – it’s someone who is taking a chance to invest in a campaign they believe in. Before 2008, email donations weren’t really a big thing, and now I don’t know a single campaign that doesn’t rely on them.
[**So when I email you, it’s because contributions from these emails will help determine what our campaign can accomplish over the next year. So if you’re able, your support today would be a massive help.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231210-1-tt&t=2&akid=898%2E135344%2EztA-hU)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826

subject: Please, answer immediately: >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi team, it's Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because even after multiple indictments and pushing our democracy to the brink, Donald Trump is _still_ statistically tied with Joe Biden in the polls!

We need to know that Democrats everywhere are prepared to stand against Donald Trump -- because it's going to take _all of us_ to keep him from inflicting four more years of misery on the country.

**We've launched our Official 2024 Straw Poll to make sure our grassroots team is prepared to take on Donald Trump once again, but I just checked our records and didn't see your response --_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/15883?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231210-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231210-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&akid=12826%2E9716520%2E6szUzl)
**Who do you support for president in 2024?**
| | | [BIDEN](https://go.dscc.org/go/15883?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231210-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231210-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&akid=12826%2E9716520%2E6szUzl)
---
| [TRUMP](https://go.dscc.org/go/15883?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231210-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231210-Diana-DianaOfficialStrawPoll23RF-Pros-sl1&akid=12826%2E9716520%2E6szUzl)
---

Thank you for your input,

Diana
Research Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

| | Patriot,

---
After an Appeals Court largely upheld the FEDERAL GAG ORDER against me, _I vowed to take this fight all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court._
---
That’s why I’m now asking YOU to join your fellow patriots in signing my Official Petition to restore my First Amendment Rights – and, _ultimately_ , protect YOURS as well.
---
**[Please add your name to my Official Petition: Restore President Donald J. Trump’s First Amendment Rights.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=6bf8009ae78744a8acebcebbb0bbd038&_e=CQRI0S7KrN56PtBb6rRDXLWlMnma1Do6rpilFMgGtmXqjkL56oqSDwDhzAhPS2QmBEXXW83dGf9gyXdANzgZNzWu-mxEkYAwRx9_rvbAEgJCLfiH_5iiXo4xRw4WcRxLncjCud612NOuhgcnucbYae_httHFvRZe91kShz-lsG6ilCw8NmyP_S5_JORptpftvjbBCRzXM3c_89M71Lo9F-s_XbYz6-6uCO7TtUJafzpnsF4-6OMqQyDFe852TooZ6O7sBBmiS4Jr1PczYQNqQTisvcG5Q9yVS2fmAxouqOccalcapV6-XVV96V6Gt7ZlNWM1yc79GWwofCeHUBVSNG3fo5T5z13EAAq41v6rDItA-rwQX_BKB21XKXuN0bm5AJZlTnvEBe9SRf0rsNI-fWhXOtitd_-GdVFIz5rFzkXRHqji9DOtIG1WIwjEW37pkI6f56EYoU6GEUKp_u5eSJk1ZhPK-D_WW_G2_NHtUeKt4l_WQjQNW5ZCE6IOMan1)**

---

In the midst of a presidential election, the LEADING contender to win back the White House has been _**GAGGED**_ and _**CENSORED**_ by the ruling party’s Department of “Justice.”
---
Let me add that _every_ _single_ _judge_ on the D.C. Circuit panel that upheld this tyrannical gag order against me was appointed by a Democrat President.
---
Make no mistake: this isn’t just about _my_ free speech...
---
...This is about protecting the integrity of the entire First Amendment against a power-drunk political machine that will stop at nothing to silence and censor anyone who stands in its way.

| Dear Fellow Patriot,

My team and I are committed to championing conservative solutions that fortify our nation's foundations -- faith, liberty, community, and life. We're boldly standing up for pro-life principles and leading the charge for the significant improvement of our education system, with special emphasis on the teaching of true American history. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V6W_dvBuKxbEtgGdiL1HdQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWIkCP0SgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvY3llLTIwMjM_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWN5ZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9VjJfUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjEwJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMTFFUDAwM1cDc3BjQgplc4zddWVCHkr6UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Although our resolve is unwavering, and our mission is clear, I need your help to refine our strategies and improve our efforts. Your invaluable perspective plays a critical role in shaping the future of our efforts.

I have prepared a brief survey that seeks to understand your views better. The survey focuses on the following key areas:

* Our effectiveness in promoting and preserving conservative values.
* The impact of our 'Little Patriots' educational program.
* Our pro-life advocacy efforts.

You can start the survey here: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/cye-2023](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/V6W_dvBuKxbEtgGdiL1HdQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnWIkCP0SgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvY3llLTIwMjM_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWN5ZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9VjJfUEEtUk9OLTIwMjMxMjEwJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMTFFUDAwM1cDc3BjQgplc4zddWVCHkr6UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).

Your response will not only provide critical feedback but will also help me shape our future initiatives. I invite you to share your thoughts with me today. Your voice matters, and together, we can continue on our quest to preserve and promote the conservative values that make our nation great!

I sincerely appreciate your time, input, and unwavering support!

Best Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Bob Casey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1342%2E552475%2EB-BAFm)
Peter --
We have some big news for Pennsylvania.
Thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, we are on our way to restoring rail service between Scranton and New York, allowing Pennsylvanians to travel quickly and conveniently. I fought for this my entire career, and I'm proud to have secured critical investments that will move regular service along this corridor closer to reality.
**This is about more than trains -- it could bring up to $84 million a year in economic activity and jobs to the region.** Along with other important railroad investments to improve travel between Philadelphia and Pittsburgh and open a corridor between Philadelphia and Reading, there will be important impacts on the economy and jobs all over Pennsylvania.
Peter, this didn't happen overnight. This announcement is the result of over 15 years of work, and I'm proud to have advocated for this game-changing investment for our communities.
**[I'll continue fighting for investments like this for our Commonwealth, and I'll keep pushing this project forward-- but I'll need your help to keep making progress in the Senate. Can you chip in to our re-election campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210-1&refcode2=1342_552475_B-BAFm&akid=1342%2E552475%2EB-BAFm)**
I've taken a lot of early morning and late night trains back and forth from Washington throughout my time in the Senate. I know how critical our railways can be to connect people with jobs, education, and much more.
Reconnecting my hometown of Scranton -- the best city in the world -- with a massive economic center like New York is long overdue.
**[These kinds of economic investments take time and dedication to secure for Pennsylvania families. I'll always fight for our Commonwealth in the U.S. Senate, and I'd be honored to have your support to continue that work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210-1&refcode2=1342_552475_B-BAFm&akid=1342%2E552475%2EB-BAFm)****
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210-1&refcode2=1342_552475_B-BAFm&akid=1342%2E552475%2EB-BAFm)**
With gratitude,
Bob

PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102

Fellow American,

We want to remind you of something ahead of the 2024 elections.

Remember it wasn't just the Democrats who rigged ⁦Abe Hamadeh's election, Kari Lake's election, Donald Trump's election, and countless other conservative races across the country.

**_It was the Establishment & their friends on the Courts, and we WILL remember that next November._**

We will never forget.

**[Click here if you will remember what the Establishment did to our MAGA movement, our American Values, and our country.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a42de19be1db4b7189b937a62f142de3&_e=0fNT1AzrWDu-GZGs5txiL1nEr76rZqJE2iSkLfbm_un55ZhpZJiY4VHtDusNSugoTmr4rbTvB9h5sYxjyIoKt-tGQMCLsG-qTrym5PfnsRPhWSMPcMC__5gFU7ZsmhrcCgG0fDb4GHTG3TyL33pa0-NC5BO435b1rvWD92ME1von5E7n3Vl9SzoezvdDRtKl9e2h63FPqtV-yr6rSNvxNShdRtr7EVWGpEBMOTWMljcWBCvQESuSDA7LknZQTKF1zIWu-MSDimXQ0wAEhNIOadWIe2-SCdnMeQ_uMMWhFmll0Dfd9-_planYbrKtfdGWW6hFASNtW3VEsLoawIP2GPPhsYmFioWF33IZ-BQNdI_0UP5mG82E1LOs_rbY8fXZ)**

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=467dd7ff1db7420d912ec1f72e502835&_e=YVoFLaPEa9fyJge0_0HZ3J0ox1yWCU2AkvqcNT0B2yhdKV0BUm4odqh94H9hVZ-WU4jPORVYTN2vNvj--t18L1QBpD7xymTsQpR1jp0FOaYVCZYU2nHK25NNH_u9KKammnWL5IYI-8b38d6p-CfFIRpha3_9H5-geCjwe1zIkz1cGgH2niX1SCYZ1vAVco-X5DWb_QwcoyucyXu-m5UOaeNHG-XD2C4yNzAwO4ufKF9DPviMnqdOMmiVlIhoHWQHSWIDc7NqBCbX-PJQJ8f9XWIZs9gu1dHZsyVpsRn8qSTSkGMiUkxWw2UiWnWmGxuzi20no3ayAIySaL7lLUU1kMbPst9ZdmzwMH7VA1apobHM1lcKnSOs1-aBfUzTVcOSV1gxhUhiuNjMDKbXBkEQhj1HLYn8VRzuaAZZqH8lBLEbWi3_KbP12T8EgbCnw6sA)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=467dd7ff1db7420d912ec1f72e502835&_e=YVoFLaPEa9fyJge0_0HZ3J0ox1yWCU2AkvqcNT0B2yhdKV0BUm4odqh94H9hVZ-WU4jPORVYTN2vNvj--t18L1QBpD7xymTsQpR1jp0FOaYVCZYU2nHK25NNH_u9KKammnWL5IYI-8b38d6p-CfFIRpha3_9H5-geCjwe1zIkz1cGgH2niX1SCYZ1vAVco-X5DWb_QwcoyucyXu-m5UOaeNHG-XD2C4yNzAwO4ufKF9DPviMnqdOMmiVlIhoHWQHSWIDc7NqBCbX-PJQJ8f9XY1aj00CacWxdztkmAuR4lrMPnUitNDZTXZmwZHAUyA1M6d6xXDYgbWiF272tZpUtysclCQFC5kn-U6t5aI6xf3d2N5Op9Pn6oeGGtQHcySfbNwMHaCKynz9WNTTJo9X7lQ0eWfEjlkzEJGxOUbFzja8xZq7XAvYR7FpS_qCeZOa)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=467dd7ff1db7420d912ec1f72e502835&_e=YVoFLaPEa9fyJge0_0HZ3J0ox1yWCU2AkvqcNT0B2yhdKV0BUm4odqh94H9hVZ-WU4jPORVYTN2vNvj--t18L1QBpD7xymTsQpR1jp0FOaYVCZYU2nHK25NNH_u9KKammnWL5IYI-8b38d6p-CfFIRpha3_9H5-geCjwe1zIkz1cGgH2niX1SCYZ1vAVco-X5DWb_QwcoyucyXu-m5UOaeNHG-XD2C4yNzAwO4ufKF9DPviMnqdOMmiVlIhoHWQHSWIDc7NqBCbX-PJQJ8f9XZdrApBIsaJgKWCWg4MQVMbEjT6Tomaef_oWkcMTMUbjYtlymTTGwLyFTQUSiTImaBsOebftmoA2MO3v2pkO8II8_Tm-NIwsCRZAhe-tLRDxDntfSOzRSHE2Zmmct7UTFLf8GGBFwV5h0VHtirDR8lC8O8k0ikijVoWr6h6Fqnjj)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=467dd7ff1db7420d912ec1f72e502835&_e=YVoFLaPEa9fyJge0_0HZ3J0ox1yWCU2AkvqcNT0B2yhdKV0BUm4odqh94H9hVZ-WU4jPORVYTN2vNvj--t18L1QBpD7xymTsQpR1jp0FOaYVCZYU2nHK25NNH_u9KKammnWL5IYI-8b38d6p-CfFIRpha3_9H5-geCjwe1zIkz1cGgH2niX1SCYZ1vAVco-X5DWb_QwcoyucyXu-m5UOaeNHG-XD2C4yNzAwO4ufKF9DPviMnqdOMmiVlIhoHWQHSWIDc7NqBCbX-PJQJ8f9XUjBswpP_Ow8kq6RwNGF6Tj4L8MBET8Gc2x1-OhdK4Zd8Eijsg9MOra4kARbULLAXwWwh5W4Cv8cg6kgzJO5CHxhOAEjFd1kqq2aO7NexvVihnCEw6mXfIDPdTvx6rw5D2hBRJMJE4V60m9wb0jNzfxoSeR6semUZnJ_bY6VtT4A).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=467dd7ff1db7420d912ec1f72e502835&_t=pis9igI3Bvw9mvVRCbj8CKknB1Ia1T4m_kXRBM1fiikj3R6E93SZco3E67_N6FhRidbPiib3hlm--aUawNanDXWwxpsF56JTI8q-cTFM7n1hPJzyibfXWl_eOmxseiYnG5PTZa8HhHa44e0akkCmo5UmGVZIJETFt-9wqn5_NsM%3D)

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Your response to this will decide everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=825fb68ab9404861b22fcceec6526467&_e=o-v9lOtQ3fu7psufMM3sgaHZ2aHeOf5ohzNoM60kZ2zsl1wpcr88DWaZ5vK8t2r1z5zU8Jh-yJDEoNjJQ2WjCSi3eAlFuntcJNp0zfgLL1JXBRG-mia1YVR0_g163Pf2K2p9d2cTuZqTYsinOfk7mIPBGomWp9f8_iRbre_aUgtzsQavLeoSb-KJvOFXD1L15jHT2X0hVsZKyMVoK4Eur29O-GrPAsn9ek4SrQq3zC9VJTgBhOOIe1nd3Cqd5eRDh2eV_hk5ms5t6OQ13WYhxAzAbEEYtsebr_VZk7fOhGE%3D)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC-10, a district that Congressman McHenrys just retired from and one that WILL decide who controls Washington.**
Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=825fb68ab9404861b22fcceec6526467&_e=o-v9lOtQ3fu7psufMM3sgaHZ2aHeOf5ohzNoM60kZ2zsl1wpcr88DWaZ5vK8t2r1z5zU8Jh-yJDEoNjJQ2WjCSi3eAlFuntcJNp0zfgLL1JXBRG-mia1YVR0_g163Pf2K2p9d2cTuZqTYsinOfk7mEk88Lz9CCKbd1fn3GzscmlhBC3wUIFJntZeXrczQqUwj0qgU5dwDocpjg0D04j41Wq8eKncC6bGRojd5ip90-mDmNQ2GJwfF9euUD-84VKgvJEArgwoFuSorb30_uDooNPq4BgHZFGaP-eZWn2MeeQ%3D)
---
The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=825fb68ab9404861b22fcceec6526467&_e=o-v9lOtQ3fu7psufMM3sgaHZ2aHeOf5ohzNoM60kZ2zsl1wpcr88DWaZ5vK8t2r1z5zU8Jh-yJDEoNjJQ2WjCSi3eAlFuntcJNp0zfgLL1LzeztCxH_YVNoDTebv1zUfxrlX-FisgQ6b-fESKjCd8XdvKnw-7vYOetCcgolEfFwhEIl8WheVopFe94tQSXP-i1hRny96G7o6I9InI0fUVZ2kjIWPNI3Jt9TMqLnk41n_gTJit5iwMRVvVMbdtnW3sOs0xlzFWrzk3F_C9Y1LKaFrlulO09IL56kJHnB1j8Q%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=825fb68ab9404861b22fcceec6526467&_e=o-v9lOtQ3fu7psufMM3sgaHZ2aHeOf5ohzNoM60kZ2zsl1wpcr88DWaZ5vK8t2r1z5zU8Jh-yJDEoNjJQ2WjCSi3eAlFuntcJNp0zfgLL1JXBRG-mia1YVR0_g163Pf2K2p9d2cTuZqTYsinOfk7mC-8kPxjd02VlHH8_mG48q4UFYZXU03bh02j8SzhM5xXFkuRuZu9cJAdb1W5rsmbqaWGzGwQP_NZ3Sbp-c1A4qteufkXxQB9oQkvtFNavXtSnBU_NTxhpV0rC6Os7Ff9AYTmxVColy6UQm16YkHQtNM%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=825fb68ab9404861b22fcceec6526467&_e=o-v9lOtQ3fu7psufMM3sgaHZ2aHeOf5ohzNoM60kZ2zsl1wpcr88DWaZ5vK8t2r1z5zU8Jh-yJDEoNjJQ2WjCSi3eAlFuntcJNp0zfgLL1JXBRG-mia1YVR0_g163Pf2K2p9d2cTuZqTYsinOfk7mO8fasl3gsJF3fqzXd1-dHE2iTWWnLRE-Hkdo2-2duf0rV_12x-ARdcXJKpHx7auQ9i1PhZp3F5d54XMQm5KIEzLIouTEhCU1J6doC0_vnnfXytlUB2Ej-05uchqAhCqeK0z9cmQB7QF3K6-FjrsY2E%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $50**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=825fb68ab9404861b22fcceec6526467&_e=o-v9lOtQ3fu7psufMM3sgaHZ2aHeOf5ohzNoM60kZ2zsl1wpcr88DWaZ5vK8t2r1z5zU8Jh-yJDEoNjJQ2WjCSi3eAlFuntcJNp0zfgLL1JXBRG-mia1YVR0_g163Pf2K2p9d2cTuZqTYsinOfk7mOD1CRKJcFkw95bXCu6pe2tej-stq6r4ZuLvoodi-uKhkCAcMZY_zddmOkUxvsAzDGAo0qhbGvYx1AtrF6O5Ipw6xYxEyBAjrCoUUZQmp6d9eJFVIK1beZE7X1VtLjbKVg88MTlZpCgTNw4BCtFMuwY%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=825fb68ab9404861b22fcceec6526467&_e=o-v9lOtQ3fu7psufMM3sgaHZ2aHeOf5ohzNoM60kZ2zsl1wpcr88DWaZ5vK8t2r1z5zU8Jh-yJDEoNjJQ2WjCSi3eAlFuntcJNp0zfgLL1JXBRG-mia1YVR0_g163Pf2K2p9d2cTuZqTYsinOfk7mA2Gvyd-LGK80LWidSWKqjFYPQ-EyazpK-uwff_L9VCsZh4QV9U5_IgjFjNKk6N42mVkDBGxkT9pSgvl4YTSj-v7rCADRS8ek_BEvDpbzBmxz23k9iCKSFVUsInoS2qu1ivfQ4B30J0-HsIt1_UOKBA%3D)
---
Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District

I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC-10, a district that Congressman McHenrys just retired from and one that WILL decide who controls Washington. Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map. The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before... I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you & God bless. Pat Harrigan GOP Conservative Candidate North Carolina's 14th District | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.
