name: David Hogg
subject: why I asked for your old furniture:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Leaders We Deserve is all-in on our mission to elect young leaders across America, so we’re going to spend as much of our budget on that mission as possible.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf2b27af-0e7d-43d9-a51e-484c56750976/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, you may have seen me asking for your old furniture a few weeks ago: Well, I’m happy to announce that the Leaders We Deserve office is 100% volunteer-furnished thanks to the help of some incredibly kind supporters in the DC area! 🎉 What does this have to do with you? Keep reading ⬇️ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td992ef54-94c4-401f-9f95-bec4b70c21f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I asked for donations of old furniture because, to be honest, I didn’t want to spend your hard-earned dollars on fancy chairs or whatever. That’s not what we’re about. Leaders We Deserve is all-in on our mission to elect young leaders across America, so we’re going to spend as much of our budget on that mission as possible. And we’re proud to have Blue Amp Action's support in this mission. [Now that we’re all set on furniture, we’re focusing on growing our grassroots movement to elect more young people across the country. We’re still counting on your support, so will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1b746d1-c918-4068-9e13-f692135a65f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10fcc637-e441-4155-9b02-7e10340a2dbd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | This fight isn’t just about this election cycle. It’s about changing the face of our government forever by electing young leaders who are capable of bringing sorely needed change that will last for generations. By splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today, you’re investing in this movement for the long haul. But in order for us to move the needle, this work depends on grassroots supporters like you. Whether it’s $5 or $50, every contribution counts. [Please consider splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today to fund the hard work ahead of us (not to buy fancy office chairs).](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7ad13d5-4f4e-4c3a-9243-bf5683125cb5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e1468e3-487c-4939-9405-74dabf1c261e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| More soon, David Hogg Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve P.S. You might be wondering why I was wearing a suit moving furniture in 95F. The day we got to move in I had a meeting at the White House, so in the middle of my U-Hauling around D.C., I had to go to that meeting, and then continue moving our stuff up several stories. (I need to find a good dry cleaner in D.C.)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Team — If there’s one thing we’ve realized from Lauren Boebert’s three years in office, it’s that she won’t shy away from any opportunity to put politics above the American people. Now, even the data is against her. **[Before we tell you more, can you pitch in $3 to help Jason take back the House today? Jason is on the front lines working to defeat extremists like Lauren Boebert and restore servant leadership to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74916989/443050948/-486953699?amount=3&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC30_20231210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGYzZDY1Yy03OTk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCm--hu7RDN--63rZSr4rcQOBsbeL0lsro8BnXXuFMY=)** Just last year, Lauren Boebert voted against the Inflation Reduction Act, calling it a “massive failure” and “a con game by Democrats.” Well, it’s been a year since the law passed, and the facts are as clear as day. * $7 billion in new manufacturing and clean energy investments in Colorado
* Over 3,500 new good-paying jobs — including 850 in her own district
* $4.5 billion for drought preparedness and response

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sponsor a Student at TPUSA's AmericaFest
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Fellow Patriot,

Turning Point USA has already heard from THOUSANDS of patriotic
student activists about AMERICAFEST 2023 -- and I don't want to
turn ANY of them away!

TPUSA's AmericaFest is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of
America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, it can be the
TIPPING POINT in our efforts to make kids love America again and
WIN the American Culture War.

Can I count on YOUR support to help bring EVEN MORE young
people to AmericaFest this year? Your gift today of $50 will help
sponsor ONE MORE student to attend ... your gift of $100 will
help sponsor TWO MORE students to attend ... and so on.

Support the AmericaFest Scholarship Fund

Above: Students at AmericaFest were INSPIRED by TUCKER CARLSON
and my friend CANDACE OWENS last year -- and we've got EXCITING
speakers planned for 2023!

There is no other event in the Conservative Movement -- or the
country -- like AmericaFest.

Over four days, AmericaFest brings together patriotic speakers,
exciting musical guests, and young people from across America ...
and, with 10,000+ grassroots patriots expected, it's on-track to
be the LARGEST Conservative event of the entire year!

Put simply: in the American Culture War, AmericaFest is a KEY
battleground, and that's why I want to do all I can to bring as
many students as possible to this year's event.

Would you consider a gift of $50 to help sponsor ONE MORE
student ... a gift of $100 to help sponsor TWO MORE students ...
and so on? But truly, any amount you're able to chip in will make
a difference for young patriots across the country.

Your gift today to TPUSA's AmericaFest Scholarship Fund could
be the reason that a young conservative from your state, or
elsewhere in America, can join this one-of-a-kind event.

Support the AmericaFest Scholarship Fund

Above: THOUSANDS of young people attended AmericaFest 2022 ...
and as you can see (photo at left), these kids stand for the
National Anthem and put their hands over their hearts for the
Pledge of Allegiance.

For more than 11 years, I've traveled across America to speak
directly with young people.

That's why I can tell you there has never been a more important
time to fight for our Pro-America values.

The "Woke" Left is working around the clock to INDOCTRINATE
young people with their toxic, racist, sexist, hateful Marxist
ideology.

And these radicals are TERRIFIED of Turning Point USA ... our
600,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states ... and the generous
support of patriotic Americans like YOU ...

Because they know that Turning Point USA can inspire MILLIONS
MORE kids to love our country again -- and WIN the American
Culture War!

This year's AmericaFest is more important than EVER, and I hope
that I can count on YOUR support to help even more young people
attend.

Support the AmericaFest Scholarship Fund

Your support of TPUSA's AmericaFest Scholarship Fund can make a
powerful difference.

A donation of $50 will sponsor ONE MORE STUDENT to attend
AmericaFest. A gift of $100 will sponsor TWO MORE STUDENTS. And
the more you give, the more students we can bring to this
one-of-a-kind event.

Please make your most generous gift right now.

Thank YOU for standing with Turning Point USA to build the NEXT
GENERATION of America-loving patriots!

Charlie Kirk

Founder & CEO

Turning Point USA

Support the AmericaFest Scholarship Fund

4940 East Beverly Road

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
Contact Email:
today@thefederalistwire.com

© Copyright
TheFederalistWire.com All Rights Reserved.

name: Team Schiff
subject: Preparing for a slower month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This is a chance to prove resoundingly that Adam is building the largest grassroots movement California has ever seen.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4692%2E5257348%2E1Yh0z1)
Derek — November and December aren’t easy months for campaign fundraising.
Between the holidays, the colder weather, and the endless emails from stores offering sales, campaigns often have a harder time reaching their fundraising goals for the month.
And honestly, **the timing couldn’t be worse.**
This month marks our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year — and the final full quarter before the March 5 primary election. **It’s no exaggeration to say that every major media outlet and political pundit will be gauging our campaign’s viability to advance to the November election by how much we raise in the next three weeks.**
**[To catch up on our goal and make sure we post the best possible numbers by the end of the month, we’re going to ask you to pitch in a little more than we usually do. Derek, can you chip in $25 to Adam’s campaign today?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20231210_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=4&akid=4692%2E5257348%2E1Yh0z1)**
With December 31st marking our final complete FEC quarter of the California Senate Primary, we have one *final* opportunity to show the strength of Adam’s campaign.
This is a chance to prove resoundingly that Adam is building the largest grassroots movement California has ever seen.
This is a crucial moment to show Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, Sean Hannity, and all the MAGA attackers that their smears and insults of Adam don’t stand in the way of him becoming a U.S. Senator.
This is huge, Derek — and it’s why we need to hit our goal.
**With the holiday slump, we’re counting on this team to step up a little extra, which is why we’re asking you to pitch in a slightly higher amount than we normally ask for.**
**[Can you contribute $25 or another amount to help us send Adam to the Senate?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20231210_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=5&akid=4692%2E5257348%2E1Yh0z1)**

name: Debra
subject: Reaching out about my son Ritchie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74917779/443053731/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTUyZmM3NC03Yjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TtUA5Y_MgQIzgZsn52UJRQQh2rVY7iE4sRLQ3JDGkg=) I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress.

As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | [CONTRIBUTE TO SUPPORT MY SON RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74917780/443053732/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTUyZmM3NC03Yjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TtUA5Y_MgQIzgZsn52UJRQQh2rVY7iE4sRLQ3JDGkg=)
---
I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74917781/443053733/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTUyZmM3NC03Yjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9TtUA5Y_MgQIzgZsn52UJRQQh2rVY7iE4sRLQ3JDGkg=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | = I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House. His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage. Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today. My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter. **TRUTH: The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.**
Fellow American,

My two parents who brought me into this world and my wife, Apoorva, and our two sons, are the most important people in my life. Family is a grounding institution, one that matters and is worth preserving.

I have talked about how America is losing its sense of national identity and losing our ability to believe in God — we absolutely cannot lose and degrade the importance of family. The fabric of our country is built on the love and care we give to future generations and in making sure our country continues to thrive with each passing year, not just election cycles.

| [** FOR OUR FUTURE GENERATIONS **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=bf17e42d125740bda6387d5a2b6978df&_e=0os4FQFtJZQI_CsZr-aGucikpFEiYrsYCmpDu-Ur3_QlxeoY-Ubma-s68UDYFAW496gQ8oYm5nMZuqvt0zYuBMBkS1-1aTkf4ZBKziKwZTB_P99QWYvJ5hiWOQuVobD5RfWWqaNznxKHkVD3_Z83tBIJmlXMFrKaMpiG7vK3j6o23-Ewa98hPR0pp8VzFRaFHeEG1gA4RnJMBtraaKDi7r8Ogi0wIrquzMcXb4sIeJU1-mHKnZG6O83YzmH0GeOS6lUQ989Di_5HHWDieb41EVLLqHbTUH96_UndNU-ZCJGn7T6NwBRzxyAslTQS7dQfYCqM4RCeBOxnWFULqzHUpSQGavEsB2vpXvkWgGkmPggWu1Tdzd8dfSBU0GBWe80khH09W7ZdQ6K1qAADn72fmA%3D%3D)
---

We’ve gotten lazy just being against the other side, forgetting what we actually stand for. The nuclear family is the foundation of a flourishing nation. I have loved meeting the families who come in droves to our campaign events. We all want a better opportunity for our future generations and children.

[**I refuse to continue letting my sons grow up in a country where many people cannot even answer what it means to be an American. Our family’s top mission in the White House: revive our national character and the importance of the family institution. Apoorva and I are ready for the challenge.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=bf17e42d125740bda6387d5a2b6978df&_e=0os4FQFtJZQI_CsZr-aGucikpFEiYrsYCmpDu-Ur3_QlxeoY-Ubma-s68UDYFAW496gQ8oYm5nMZuqvt0zYuBMBkS1-1aTkf4ZBKziKwZTB_P99QWYvJ5hiWOQuVobD5RfWWqaNznxKHkVD3_Z83tBIJmlXMFrKaMpiG7vK3j6o23-Ewa98hPR0pp8VzFRaFHeEG1gA4RnJMBtraaKDi7r8Ogi0wIrquzMcXb4sIeJU1-mHKnZG6O83YzmH0GeOSF4MV9uVuVq-8TasGfuXetT8JBuJijI1I2xGtM69bh_QhLNx7rI2JooGtydaAjvJLRz61CIWs8PgOdqrvguaJV8ceKKXBYXLxLIlwCidBnOJtAeEzfK6IEMwSk53toa_89_jlqcZ9MXbgf5XMk8I7mA%3D%3D)

We won’t be able to save what’s worth saving in this country if we do not first fight for the institution of the family.

Thank you,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=bf17e42d125740bda6387d5a2b6978df&_e=0os4FQFtJZQI_CsZr-aGucikpFEiYrsYCmpDu-Ur3_QlxeoY-Ubma-s68UDYFAW496gQ8oYm5nMZuqvt0zYuBMBkS1-1aTkf4ZBKziKwZTB_P99QWYvJ5hiWOQuVobD5RfWWqaNznxKHkVD3_Z83tBIJmlXMFrKaMpiG7vK3j6o23-Ewa98hPR0pp8VzFRaFHeEG1gA4RnJMBtraaKDi7r8Ogi0wIrquzMcXb4sIeJU1-mHKnZG6O83YzmH0GeOS50YV8HWykXas1OFIy07cyznhDnXSDMod-6eRPv_npLwVhqU8Y39RuDMtDFpc0_bTNIexzKAPOhtRALa6cvp5XdxIRWezuYozG8Pb_dp96dP6qgVHmRZDYGng8YTm3s_m-lYAm0-3LH5EIrYLLFiSAg%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** FIGHT FOR FAMILY **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=bf17e42d125740bda6387d5a2b6978df&_e=0os4FQFtJZQI_CsZr-aGucikpFEiYrsYCmpDu-Ur3_QlxeoY-Ubma-s68UDYFAW496gQ8oYm5nMZuqvt0zYuBMBkS1-1aTkf4ZBKziKwZTB_P99QWYvJ5hiWOQuVobD5RfWWqaNznxKHkVD3_Z83tBIJmlXMFrKaMpiG7vK3j6o23-Ewa98hPR0pp8VzFRaFHeEG1gA4RnJMBtraaKDi7r8Ogi0wIrquzMcXb4sIeJU1-mHKnZG6O83YzmH0GeOS0W2amB5I4YXAYUH43yqhV3IsWeBy2el9ro0tqEMndVhWkpUZHBmZ8rHBR1PwFiaKmB8JrcxAybtdXcOKOosrPK3GANjn30ykwvkOWuBf59qW-G2bdCU_jfQ7NstVnPopmbQKojJKbzrHaPeT0CGxYQ%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

body:
If you hated Phase 1 of Soros’s plans, you’re REALLY going to hate Phase 2...| | | Peter, our team has discovered something extremely alarming... **George Soros is moving into the next phase of his judicial takeover, and[2024 may be our last chance to stop him.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=37564f667a7148d993ddd7e1466449f6&_e=vHsZMuMN5D4sLcpbw5pWh2v3SsPrAvMATGNE40z4IHyTVqedTJbDsjJxnfjLxeviIUql8iy4LnfxVnmFPoh9ZOPWgJO9NGOf1UjRNpD_y-cVjUYzCKBkm8IZisApZYXpPyrRFzQvLhgrKtONyDRPy7403Kk9LHbIRAzn7wL_Z0fK9DcsjBmU7KBQFP-gH0vgT94VIzUkfWWgrGKEIhocb3R9u9lS77y--SdpNTC8fKXVkl6Ntc-tR_yaG21orERiqF-an4kKxggN5MrviYTPzWoO-4o84tzSHBdPv6q7O2MaVa99jHm5xN7ny3O_6st-5C_YT8WVabxnbazlmeAyRj5aTtqK51dPaTOycPvA4nHKtC0mvjpKo_L4ynOLGz8q) ** Here’s his plan to promote radical, pro-crime policies and solidify his power:
* **PHASE 1:** Elect radical local prosecutors who refuse to prosecute crime and leave their communities in chaos.
* **PHASE 2:** Have those local prosecutors run for higher office, bringing the same disastrous policies to ENTIRE STATES.

**We’re entering Phase 2 right now.** Two of Soros's worst prosecutors are floating the idea of running for their state's Attorney General, Virginia's Steve Descano and Pennsylvania's Jack Stollsteimer. While Stollsteimer was in office, his community saw a **SHOCKING 25.5% rise in crime.** __Can you imagine what will happen if he gets to control the entire state?__ **We have to fight back NOW to ensure these lawless prosecutors NEVER help Soros get more power.** **
**
---
[**YES, I’M READY TO FIGHT BACK**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=37564f667a7148d993ddd7e1466449f6&_e=vHsZMuMN5D4sLcpbw5pWh2v3SsPrAvMATGNE40z4IHyTVqedTJbDsjJxnfjLxeviIUql8iy4LnfxVnmFPoh9ZOPWgJO9NGOf1UjRNpD_y-cVjUYzCKBkm8IZisApZYXpPyrRFzQvLhgrKtONyDRPy7403Kk9LHbIRAzn7wL_Z0fK9DcsjBmU7KBQFP-gH0vgT94VIzUkfWWgrGKEIhocb3R9u9lS77y--SdpNTC8fKXOnMw7-5l0L3t9SEqRuo7xqrRyq3721EIAdsALcQ69yP0GZQjrRfHHptSsYZgjvzFNazu2gaFtgb2GbML8RRDtLv_EPq9UlFXFM9jVqyplIZWvbNLVXcrPMqGqS1zT26jYa4kO4uad6tIYFd7YJGWS)

**We’re[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=37564f667a7148d993ddd7e1466449f6&_e=vHsZMuMN5D4sLcpbw5pWh2v3SsPrAvMATGNE40z4IHyTVqedTJbDsjJxnfjLxeviIUql8iy4LnfxVnmFPoh9ZOPWgJO9NGOf1UjRNpD_y-cVjUYzCKBkm8IZisApZYXpPyrRFzQvLhgrKtONyDRPy7403Kk9LHbIRAzn7wL_Z0fK9DcsjBmU7KBQFP-gH0vgT94VIzUkfWWgrGKEIhocb3R9u9lS77y--SdpNTC8fKXIzdTr2uiLLngWxGBXV-FxD6qWlSWFZsu_uZFydapo1aQM1gReE-QNuKTZjkb30lu7YY3CbrDjinaezB7npa1Ut3WlsvY0O_9brpEM1BcW8fKfSbIL58ZLU4aDCV0weU9yUq1GlQCDF83JQvYvmh_5). We are the ONLY organization taking a direct stand against George Soros’s scheme to take over America’s judicial system — in every office from the Supreme Court to local prosecutors.**

But tracking these races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of dark money influence _...until now._

**We’re taking Soros on, head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you.**

clean_body: | | | Important message for Florida Republicans Fellow American, we are less than a year out from Election Day, and if we’re going to win for Republicans, we have to start putting in the work now. But as we were finalizing our plans for next year, we couldn’t help but notice something. As one of our top grassroots conservatives, we were shocked that you haven’t pitched in yet to keep Florida RED. We need to raise$12,283by the end of the day today if we’re going to be on track to defend the Sunshine State from the radical Left, and we don’t want to have to tell Republican leaders that you let us down. Please, we need your urgent help to defend the most critical state for Republicans in America. | | | | | | Thank you, Team Salazar | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: Wes Moore for Maryland
subject: Maryland’s decade
body:
Friend, you’ve heard Wes say this before, but it’s worth repeating.

It’s Maryland’s decade.

But exactly does that mean?

It means setting up our students for long-term success. It means investing in programs to prepare Maryland’s youth for a lifetime of service. It means investing in public transit, economic mobility, and increasing access to opportunity.

Maryland will continue to lead the way in making sure this decade is our best one yet. This decade, we’re going to come out strong in support of our unions, protect reproductive rights, and expand gun safety laws.

The team is moving fast to cut past red tape and increase equity, not only in our state but in the whole country. With Maryland as an example, our country can prosper. If you believe in our mission to make this Maryland’s decade, make a $10 gift now to power our work. Your contribution now will help us make the change we want to see for generations to come. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210-el&express_lane=true&amount=10]

Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210-el&express_lane=true&amount=25]

Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210-el&express_lane=true&amount=50]

Donate $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210-el&express_lane=true&amount=75]

Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210-el&express_lane=true&amount=100]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231210-1?refcode=em20231210-el-other]

We can’t wait to reflect in 2030 on the decade of progress we made in Mayland.

Thanks for joining us every step of the way,

Team Wes Moore

name: STOP BIG TECH
subject: Are your children at risk?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | |
---
Peter, Big tech platforms like TikTok are digital fentanyl to our children, getting them addicted while stealing their information and taking them away from their families.

We’re taking a stand against big tech, and we need your help.

body:
Because we’re leading calls for a ceasefire, AIPAC is targeting me and Jamaal Bowman. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvp1S0kzlkrV7uOfqgmCtPqAsSVE0JSEI8OCE7SXNqO_2zNjTuG9PmpYZ4pWqQB5bzQEUGl2koFcxX3edics49QFESa8BWoDtjVdqYb2CcdNEhdHYsNO4t3iyHr5oJIUY1pFSzxagycN1ftBDbIkxeYmK8Vk1fqPBFLjusYfuAs3mxsuoxMFd9RzFqkFiFx1vLQsmPu4krIQJ8zAGxCRkLhYqSEcy2ce-n6MvRqe5yn-w/420/Lyv3V8g7SCishXctjz_sSg/h0/OGZ7GdNfptysVNDcOjGoeG9FElInYI44yj7oRNswyKc)

Friend, **AIPAC-endorsed members of Congress voted to censure me last month. And this week, they voted to censure another key member of our Squad: Rep. Jamaal Bowman.** For years, the far-right anti-Palestinian group AIPAC has attacked me and Jamaal for standing up for Palestinians’ human rights. They recently targeted us with attack ads, because we’ve been leading the movement for a ceasefire. As the death toll in Gaza has surpassed 16,000 people—including over 6,000 children—Jamaal and I are still urging Congress and President Biden to value all human life. **Because Jamaal Bowman continues to hold the Israeli and U.S. governments accountable for human rights violations, AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire candidate to run against him in 2024.** [**AIPAC is planning to spend $100 million to undermine our democracy and try to kick me and Jamaal Bowman out of Congress next year. Please donate $5 or more to our campaigns today so we can counter these attacks.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rEt8-lfD1ZZUUiDWuQieYJ8fGet69xcDglUASGKx4KMAberyp7k33mdZVoiinXZwY2R2AaSU8KqkxDSOCW3C4SPmz0PkNXJJlftxSZf9cwoEXDX0wZK8vs5-YfohFAIerOjYZYm2g57OJeUzo8cohDHXNkUPEDZ1ByoF6w0iWgJRUZygA--oQ2Y7wFaISkJraw56MHIhhPahl3Z9KFu8EP4JFh2rAZk1qysFT55qby1-OXh-8WRW3wb9MOKBVJItLz6XYkz_Vlf7n_Q52QbluvKYSabnjx5QxQFDVywGHK_6lH_USdP2npprpQKLARMakIlBtT9rOv6QPRUC7uPF-PbQAflWAzTOWU3-u9WWxFXHIcmSyzOsHktg-z5_Ps6H5Q/420/Lyv3V8g7SCishXctjz_sSg/h1/p3Rjk_Od0HDYR-9QV6qiVqKOdLO7xwwtNZbkivHQl_U) | [CHIP IN TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rEt8-lfD1ZZUUiDWuQieYJ8fGet69xcDglUASGKx4KMAKGmYLxLEj81dQkmmj_JhtGxnzB_8UDz8_EgphfHhLddZ2D409yAt1v8fSvxRW9TTvv5gsVeoucYQt0ZmrK4JgiDJZirrAZhJUIbZZNGb59bRncVJrxTfi96F92PkB-72vM2S-6ZiJ6v2xmERirhdvjLCdgPUC0iv3WoiFCJLCCN9K6l66PtUhEHcVb--AFLRIh8tXYlzdB6MeTsBsciLvbtl6Tosw-g7RC_MzUfEn80u4bxd0p54z7-grNKamYtDUNvaidjwcjzU2mWwDH-8QFOPxd93cjKWgzgJ0fyZc2nLO3S1X0D2nLK5i4sye7QVNIpE9hmNvkvcCT2ZgnuhZw/420/Lyv3V8g7SCishXctjz_sSg/h2/q0p3yEN4E2MGIUJhsRWMNeAaQ-_XBNW0UQrO84lJFTI)

As usual, AIPAC and its network of PACs are targeting progressive Black and brown members of Congress, flooding our working class districts with millions of dollars from far-right donors. They’re attacking us for supporting a ceasefire, even though it’s what a vast majority of Americans want.

Eva Borgwardt, a leader with IfNotNow, a movement of American Jews to end Israeli occupation and apartheid, explained:
> _“AIPAC is not a Jewish lobby, nor even a pro-Israel lobby. It is primarily a vehicle for Republican billionaires to support the settlement movement and an antidemocratic, far-right vision for both Israel and the U.S.”_
**I’m proud to serve alongside Jamaal Bowman in Congress. He has taken on the racist and antisemitic “great replacement theory,” and he’s a leader in the push for a multi-racial democracy where all marginalized people can thrive.**
Jamaal is denouncing the hate-fueled violence against Jewish Americans, Arab Americans, and Muslim Americans. After Palestinian students were shot in Vermont, he wrote: _“Now more than ever we must come together and center peace, love, and our shared humanity.”_
Unlike most members of Congress, Jamaal has taken a principled stance against the mass murder of civilians. And this past week he joined me in voting against HR 894, a dangerous resolution conflating anti-Zionism with antisemitism.
**Jamaal and I understand that, like all people, Palestinians deserve to live with equal rights, freedom, and human dignity. We are dedicated to equity and justice for all people, and we recognize the value of every single life.**
**Our voices are critical in Congress, as too many of our colleagues continue to beat the drums of war and vote to send billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars to bomb Gaza.**
[**Please chip in today to support our grassroots re-election campaigns, as AIPAC funds attack ads targeting us and plans to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat us in 2024.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKuxxxGNCMufLZFZwalOj6rEt8-lfD1ZZUUiDWuQieYJ8fGet69xcDglUASGKx4KMALZuH4Phw4V_6IskBf-rlW9wKgZb1ppCm8WeDVusKubFjcXHAc5eNpQZE8NFY3Kqg5iMjPtURBvd7xF_ol9dxw7fcEEvqmOWunJHpEqYX2GRDJ3vqhZlhHpAAbT-vU2wVV8M-8p8S8DJtshkrTna4QHtdf1A5N54m9U1HPMWtKQb57jPflGWvW2sD29Sntd8Q8ObFDeagNHZrFalEMOj0GtV_V5Bekh2L2v48pFP1xI0iOp34Pdkez63xIbtnxos4T17Xia93Y9V_YXJF5oJbqgCc_1tBkG25hvmP0xteb6JpjdfdoO24IDpaXks8NUivPBD7glxVHhLA29jMCJ4Ikg/420/Lyv3V8g7SCishXctjz_sSg/h3/VfphwOLfWF8Bwetecv1x8IpnCnj_bgzndHRHV8FY1nM)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Dec 9, 2023
Subject: AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire candidate to run against Jamaal Bowman:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
**Rep. Jamaal Bowman has been an outspoken leader in the movement for a ceasefire.** **AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire candidate who just announced he’s running against Jamaal in 2024.**
And this week, the House voted on a censure resolution against Jamaal. They're trying to distract from the fact they are unable to govern. They are trying to distract from the fact they can’t stop the genocide. They are distracting from the fact they can't pass a budget for the American people.
Jamaal has called out members for doing nothing to stop the gun crisis in our country. Jamaal has called out the U.S. government for being complicit in the mass murder of children and the ethnic cleansing of Palestinians. And this week he joined me in voting against HR 894, a dangerous resolution conflating anti-Zionism with antisemitism.
**Because we’re speaking up for Palestinians’ human rights, AIPAC is funding attack ads against us, and plans to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat us in next year’s elections.**

clean_body: Because we’re leading calls for a ceasefire, AIPAC is targeting me and Jamaal Bowman. | | | Friend, AIPAC-endorsed members of Congress voted to censure me last month. And this week, they voted to censure another key member of our Squad: Rep. Jamaal Bowman. For years, the far-right anti-Palestinian group AIPAC has attacked me and Jamaal for standing up for Palestinians’ human rights. They recently targeted us with attack ads, because we’ve been leading the movement for a ceasefire. As the death toll in Gaza has surpassed 16,000 people—including over 6,000 children—Jamaal and I are still urging Congress and President Biden to value all human life. Because Jamaal Bowman continues to hold the Israeli and U.S. governments accountable for human rights violations, AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire candidate to run against him in 2024. | As usual, AIPAC and its network of PACs are targeting progressive Black and brown members of Congress, flooding our working class districts with millions of dollars from far-right donors. They’re attacking us for supporting a ceasefire, even though it’s what a vast majority of Americans want. Eva Borgwardt, a leader with IfNotNow, a movement of American Jews to end Israeli occupation and apartheid, explained: “AIPAC is not a Jewish lobby, nor even a pro-Israel lobby. It is primarily a vehicle for Republican billionaires to support the settlement movement and an antidemocratic, far-right vision for both Israel and the U.S.” I’m proud to serve alongside Jamaal Bowman in Congress. He has taken on the racist and antisemitic “great replacement theory,” and he’s a leader in the push for a multi-racial democracy where all marginalized people can thrive. Jamaal is denouncing the hate-fueled violence against Jewish Americans, Arab Americans, and Muslim Americans. After Palestinian students were shot in Vermont, he wrote: “Now more than ever we must come together and center peace, love, and our shared humanity.” Unlike most members of Congress, Jamaal has taken a principled stance against the mass murder of civilians. And this past week he joined me in voting against HR 894, a dangerous resolution conflating anti-Zionism with antisemitism. Jamaal and I understand that, like all people, Palestinians deserve to live with equal rights, freedom, and human dignity. We are dedicated to equity and justice for all people, and we recognize the value of every single life. Our voices are critical in Congress, as too many of our colleagues continue to beat the drums of war and vote to send billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars to bomb Gaza. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Jamaal Bowman and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | Our movement is growing, and we will not stop demanding human rights for Palestinians and all people. Thank you for being an important part of the work to save lives. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Dec 9, 2023 Subject: AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire candidate to run against Jamaal Bowman: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Rep. Jamaal Bowman has been an outspoken leader in the movement for a ceasefire. AIPAC recruited an anti-ceasefire candidate who just announced he’s running against Jamaal in 2024. And this week, the House voted on a censure resolution against Jamaal. They're trying to distract from the fact they are unable to govern. They are trying to distract from the fact they can’t stop the genocide. They are distracting from the fact they can't pass a budget for the American people. Jamaal has called out members for doing nothing to stop the gun crisis in our country. Jamaal has called out the U.S. government for being complicit in the mass murder of children and the ethnic cleansing of Palestinians. And this week he joined me in voting against HR 894, a dangerous resolution conflating anti-Zionism with antisemitism. Because we’re speaking up for Palestinians’ human rights, AIPAC is funding attack ads against us, and plans to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat us in next year’s elections. Last year, AIPAC and its network of PACs spent $40 million against Black and brown progressives, with most of the funds coming from Republican donors who’ve supported Trump. An AIPAC spokesperson claimed that Jamaal is part of an “extremist fringe,” but our calls for a ceasefire are in line with the vast majority of Americans—across the political spectrum. The rest of Congress needs to catch up and value all human life. Jamaal is especially able to humanize Palestinians because he’s visited the West Bank, where he met with my sity (my grandmother). He was stopped at a military checkpoint near her house, and saw first-hand how Palestinians live in fear under constant military presence. And he connected that to his own experience as a Black man in the U.S. who’s been targeted by police violence. Jamaal and I know that the struggles for justice and equality are interconnected, from the U.S. to Palestine and beyond. That’s why we continue to take politically courageous stands, despite attempts to silence and intimidate us. AIPAC is working with far-right Trump donors to interfere in our democracy. They’re targeting candidates of color representing working class districts, who rely on grassroots donations rather than corporate PAC money. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Jamaal Bowman and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | Thank you for joining me and Jamaal in recognizing our shared humanity. Peter, It’s the most wonderful time of the year. Our team has been brainstorming ways to **[wish President Donald J. Trump a Merry Christmas,](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c08d1e072978416e9a8f919a1542cdd4&_e=UGt3rYmzb3STSH9Uh84m0LdGuxgGYqGESICQ-ngOMFoYyGLnzadDtbBsM7Komj3rds1-sF0qYursrf90PowCvFj4as2ZVexzh7u3oCFragzeWXhT2efxPXsuNNMIIROTtkTyV7vxDt9EsBUIoSiVbmr6XZs_-fNjVN6oWEcMYJDSDvSrRnWk_d5GCEQzIcpSNvjtyxgYvqVboFBGFt80GWVckIthhfeHfTqMllNWfaHqjlY8AHN0C2zzQDVTLIj4FoikBVYMc3ZklhnNj1vU2l8vdLeBsMIOQ3Na3HASyXsd0jOaVhfWwYF-fPWcJwhXNE7NXmoG_BTeyQs_W99DfTXksXHy7n5Q9Aiq5gr14gd59UTO4mcjecR1GwxwvrjxtTCwK6h71Od1nH55u-6x4i3ChsGI4y2wIsIjmScjHAFH-4quX-hJTzmdRGwWrP_F3DzzOH77MUCeFtO9D6mnJg%3D%3D)** and we thought: _what better way to surprise him on Christmas morning than with a letter signed by MILLIONS of MAGA patriots?_

| | **Dear President Trump,**** ** **MERRY CHRISTMAS!**** ****We, the American people, want to wish you and your family a happy holiday season.

****Millions of American patriots are standing by your side against the far-Left’s witch hunts during these dark times. We’re with you 100%.**** ****Despite the corrupt Democrats’ best efforts, the America First movement is UNSTOPPABLE. Under your leadership, we’re going to take our country back from the radical Marxists and _MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN._**** ****NEVER SURRENDER!**** ****Sincerely,**** ****The Silent Majority**

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr. on the Threshold [Watch]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
This is a crucial moment in our campaign.

|
---
| | | **This is a crucial moment in our campaign.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_video_email_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Authentic change in politics comes from just one place – the collective will of the people. Today, we invite you to step into a movement that is reshaping the political landscape.
As RFK Jr. surges in the polls, he needs your support to cross a major threshold: inclusion on the ballot next November. “Your support” means you personally, because we are aspiring to 100% participation.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRY0vlZPDYmnNnFtCCf1wfHw&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_video_email_1_nd&n=2)
This is a crucial moment in our campaign.
Unlike the two party candidates, an independent must gather signatures in every state to get on the ballot. Now more than ever, your contribution holds the key to transforming mere hope into actual change. We don’t have the corporate dollars. That’s why we need you to support our 50-state all-out effort.
We understand that not everyone can contribute the same amount. Like the diverse offerings in a church collection basket, every donation, regardless of size, builds solidarity. It says, “We take this mission seriously.” [Even $5 signals the strength of our movement.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_video_email_1_nd&n=3)
[As we strive for 100% participation, any amount you can give helps our grassroots efforts to put RFK Jr. on the ballot. Stand with us, be part of the movement, and help restore our democracy.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_video_email_1_nd&n=4)
[DONATE NOW >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_video_email_1_nd&n=5)
Thank you for your generous support. We WILL make a difference.
Team Kennedy
[Kennedy24.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_video_email_1_nd&n=6)

Fellow American, right now, it seems to me like a popular thing in Washington, D.C., is to tell people you will do one thing and then do another. Growing up, my mother would call that fibbing.

You might know it as lying. Others might even refer to it as hogwash. Baloney. Poppycock.

Frankly, I can't stand it. I'm not always the most brilliant guy in the room or the best-looking, but I pride myself on being honest and never giving you the runaround.

If I tell you a flea can pull a wagon, load it up.

Right now, we're in an all-out brawl against the Socialist Left for common sense in our country.

I'm happy to be on the front lines every single day.

Fighting to keep your family safe by securing our Southern Border.

Fighting to keep money in your wallet by helping straighten out the economy.

Fighting for your values every day from the Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist workers.

All that I ask from you is to have my back.

Anything that you can spare today below to help me hit a **CRITICAL NOVEMBER FUNDRAISING DEADLINE** will go miles to help me.

I'm counting on you like you can always count on me to shoot it straight. | [**HELP ME SECURE THE SOUTHERN BORDER**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=aaf398bd2a7146d5b6adcf6b7536b604&_e=fEqhxpSzNXRf5ObfwiWEOcCbRN3_TDtLuG-03BVXGD7kB6zb7GCdMl7m6MmInu2tgbkpfp9DH6tv-ZJk_v3YM2B71ChGP7gXO1HhOofT6ztST-YtvTw2SRKaSMSCiqr7jsYpkMgJiBP2tKLvAsCg2BrXEyYcWqvEa7ZjvCGM1TB894d_SnMet-467BpX0r_LcRW6-1b_WTX48WSaCkqgsekX6FD94SDgGj9Vo3_O1tAaxeR7RtLMPWZ3S0Xpp4iloU1LkA5DZongaXF0BD2PTaRFGUb6kcla2CQp1ZRj8dQ1yKghXP2eNSGatOVEYt_eCCMyQyDUeaFa0d6Rx8lRHNF_8BEdyd3X7hAiVntjcGFqkc046nKInBcyTbIuGw9u9X6PddmuRbnpYcj7J1OsWQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: You might know it as lying. | Fellow American, right now, it seems to me like a popular thing in Washington, D.C., is to tell people you will do one thing and then do another. Growing up, my mother would call that fibbing. You might know it as lying. Others might even refer to it as hogwash. Baloney. Poppycock. Frankly, I can't stand it. I'm not always the most brilliant guy in the room or the best-looking, but I pride myself on being honest and never giving you the runaround. If I tell you a flea can pull a wagon, load it up. Right now, we're in an all-out brawl against the Socialist Left for common sense in our country. I'm happy to be on the front lines every single day. Fighting to keep your family safe by securing our Southern Border. Fighting to keep money in your wallet by helping straighten out the economy. Fighting for your values every day from the Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist workers. All that I ask from you is to have my back. Anything that you can spare today below to help me hit a CRITICAL NOVEMBER FUNDRAISING DEADLINE will go miles to help me. I'm counting on you like you can always count on me to shoot it straight. | Let's wrap this up, folks. With you on my team, I'm not sweating it in the slightest. God Bless, Senator Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?**

name: Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
subject: 2024 is right around the corner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re in the final month of the year, so I wanted to quickly connect with you and share some thoughts on my outlook for December.
#
Hey Peter, it's Lauren, Pramila's Campaign Manager!
We’re in the final month of the year, so I wanted to quickly connect with you and share some thoughts on my outlook for December.
**2024 is right around the corner, and that means our campaign is kicking into high gear.** More organizing, stronger fundraising, and a deep impact down-ballot are all on the horizon for this movement — but only if we start putting in the work right now.
As the month continues, our team will be sharing more ways you can get involved in supporting our progressive movement and our campaign. In the meantime, one of the strongest ways you can support this campaign is by starting a monthly donation to help us continue to plan for our future endeavors.
[**Can we count on you to help us kick-start our December campaign fundraising by starting a monthly donation of $3, $5, $10, or whatever makes sense to you today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47981?refcode=em20231210-3256&t=1&akid=3256%2E420207%2EosLMOc)
_(You can use the buttons and links in this email to start a monthly donation)_
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47981?refcode=em20231210-3256&t=20&akid=3256%2E420207%2EosLMOc)**
Thank you for believing in the work that we’re doing together.
Let’s do this,
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231210-3256-footer&t=21&refcode2=3256_420207_osLMOc&akid=3256%2E420207%2EosLMOc)**

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: My life story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm a Christian, husband, father, attorney and conservative fighter. Let's get to work.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
---
| | |
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mgLNHTPKoLQcqJ2BCFRQew~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mgLNHTPKoLQcqJ2BCFRQew~~/AARclAA~~~ "Generic Button")
---

But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly and father to our four amazing children.

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mgLNHTPKoLQcqJ2BCFRQew~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mgLNHTPKoLQcqJ2BCFRQew~~/AARclAA~~~ "Generic Button")
---

I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor.

**I set a goal of activating 40,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running.

[Will you join my team today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mgLNHTPKoLQcqJ2BCFRQew~~/AARclAA~~~ "Will you join my team today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024? ")**

---
| | | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mgLNHTPKoLQcqJ2BCFRQew~~/AARclAA~~~ "Generic Button")
---

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our conservative movement.

God Bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

body:
How we brought nature into the classroom for our preschoolers.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74921532/443065464/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRhNzZlNDItODQ5Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7e8-TP8rFIbvVOlbZqej3EMrazxSRTloFhfNSjymNI=&emci=1e00ffa4-ba84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b4a76e42-8497-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Hey Peter, We're nearly halfway through the school year, and today I wanted to shine a light on an innovative new program here in the district — one that is setting up the youngest in our community with a bright future. **Across Los Angeles, over a dozen early childhood schools have launched 'nature explore classrooms'.** Nature explore classrooms are outdoor areas where young students are given a calm environment to learn, collaborate, and explore the outdoors. These classrooms are designed much like a park, with garden boxes, balance beams, and even music-making areas. This past Tuesday I was able to take part in a groundbreaking for a new nature classroom (suffice to say, the adorable preschoolers in hard hats were a highlight). [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74921533/443065465/-1168149126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRhNzZlNDItODQ5Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c7e8-TP8rFIbvVOlbZqej3EMrazxSRTloFhfNSjymNI=&emci=1e00ffa4-ba84-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b4a76e42-8497-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=10481059) These classrooms have been years in the making. After voters approved funding to help our district update classrooms and renovate school buildings, we went to work. Instead of asphalt playgrounds with little-to-no activities, we were able to create spaces across the district where preschoolers could safely explore outdoor life with classmates, from growing vegetables to observing insects in their gardens. As a teacher, I'm extremely excited about what these classrooms can do for our kids and our community. Research shows us that nature classrooms can help kids develop behavioral regulation and critical thinking skills. For our kids here in early childhood education, this is an important stage of brain development before they head off to kindergarten. I'm proud of our community for coming together to make these classrooms a reality. Thanks to the efforts of voters and our school board, we were able to come together and make our schools better for the next generation — setting them up for success that will last a lifetime. More soon, _Nick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

body:
We’re closer than ever to defeating the MAGA GOP majority
| **Did you see the _good news_ ➡ Democrats are closer than ever to flipping the House!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57959?t=6&akid=12022%2E878179%2EfQlGJC) | [**HELP HOUSE DEMOCRATS KEEP UP THEIR MOMENTUM: CHIP IN $7 NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57960?t=7&akid=12022%2E878179%2EfQlGJC)
---
**1#:** The MAGA GOP holds a five-seat majority, _that’s a teeny tiny margin by historical standards._

**2#:** 18 Republicans sit in districts carried by Biden, while only 5 Democrats sit in districts carried by Trump in 2020.

**3#:** By all standards, Democrats sit at an advantage so if we fail to flip the House it will be because of one thing **➡ Democratic supporters' inaction.**
---
It would be devastating if Democrats like you let the GOP hold onto the House just because _you didn’t feel like getting involved early on._

[**➡ Can we count on you to take the next step and commit to donating $7 so we can meet our daily fundraising goal of $5,500 and ensure House Democrats FLIP the House next year?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57959?t=8&akid=12022%2E878179%2EfQlGJC)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12022%2E878179%2EfQlGJC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12022%2E878179%2EfQlGJC).**

We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=HaKO7L3QPa9L1EmXcIOwn%2B%2FPKU5J13ze%2FKyFnTDPTOUEZD6%2BowU46dpkyjMxyQJI%2FLSlXoTDkimOKiZYPp8EEwc5BJ41BEWsjo%2BC2E%2FyunYgYC3PZhF9f1VPF61f2irv2TKE2FPPb6TXr0gbTUQN3%2FIghL92s8wTgQVmsetTYZEk%2FUXbttO6bCuT7CMpy2GQ0BIUM5RSl3w9bajI812mVVIeWlEDVfvgBAMQ7yao6qT%2BUsMW3PJC3LDvrNfNpNE9cEAaZ3CcZEkxwAH3nMMr9SjBfi%2Bg9ioyOHifZyttcB20abgqMC6%2Fatuh0%2BtBgsIaF7NP%2BlQbaUdasXUfp%2FlwkD69mZCOhXXvy11nypOViUsyy1kP8s2dU3qXvBKH%2BnhBMzBrpPtk7jRHFlHlk7Tl75zwQElq8ZJx8sw9Z8qwjlKoYHGiLZQOpaeG5W6rBUsC .

Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez.
Earlier this year, Ohio voters made history by codifying abortion rights into their state’s constitution.
But I know the fight can’t end there.
Not while Ted Cruz — who supports a nationwide abortion ban — holds power.
I’m the Democrat who has what it takes to defeat Ted Cruz and defend the right to choose here in Texas — but I need you with me. So if you can spare it, can I count on you to chip in $15 or more before midnight to defeat Ted Cruz and his anti-choice agenda? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
The pro-choice momentum we saw in Ohio is just the beginning.
So get ready, Peter: Texas is next.
And once we’ve defeated Ted Cruz, I’ll codify abortion rights — and abolish the filibuster if I have to.
If you’re ready to join me in the fight, will you step up with $15 or more straight away? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

Hi Friend,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7d4701efccdd4890868aee1c8106124c&_e=JK5TVgGJDq4_NrzMr6AsILR-svk-XBklLavGMZJYKuoJ8z-jz2h3oh3651wd9t_9K9q-Qe2syV0NdGzH6lVblx7M3nVYQg9C3Fqb26FFWUgdoy4d-4p2L_HFmnRt3S5CJHwWKFeYqUwiUrKrqXOimxGdmEYo1ykaqFXmuOxWYQDNGsjLLmmR56EY2hqFxGu7zYcEZ0JK_EH1wvnzAwVGqqa7X8I2KTqbjl2-z3q2iNpU70UVW2Ry0IHFBmDRfzJMU4Z4MKsnkXIQHIUN3YVI3p8tMMt8lZm2VQ1R4D3FeDnlYHhZIfJYRZlAaS4fUjRqje7_kkqVAL-6r2Et-UUxxEQcOpGbowVNrpFPErYLM73Pgi098cnIzKC7N6w4j9CWdmzx1XkL6l4r_qVSNtxUOZvaqrNq0iIJtCLvW3zirne-B5zMX4-vRklw-UVsg0ODAvuDwbLn67K3Aml5k97KlDXR55EvpcFvMczfvLDLD3WrdBPi205Gb7mWwLRj-USuieWaVoBRdw0l7Zj9tqDrRzjmz4OE9ILR1Pa4I-oIggZbd-5p_ynSAuy_Iqk9YoXj "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7d4701efccdd4890868aee1c8106124c&_e=JK5TVgGJDq4_NrzMr6AsILR-svk-XBklLavGMZJYKuoJ8z-jz2h3oh3651wd9t_9ElsO8slsosyYCtprocK6ahhQLaF6Xw8AQgntVqwvZGpmVH-72rE5-riSSelI5wVJC9o82d8kX8srJ_crAeFUyPIJJYIr8f4R2rISkVG8u8syh8RUo0qXfR9AmvPqGym2eCn3SBnRebYX6fzwi0MR_0H7jLYBkTih8k_m5Tk81VdMa36q-iKLkioUTtmepUtLGiaQn7_QKPCMtpfqBz_0MYbFoEV9_Nxg7jwnH-N0sqhtJAQ2T2O2bm4wNW4XY464tilIGRq11HuPOpA_eDC-57Fewb6WLNfEx5Qirg5JRULWogZHoLLsHOU8Hnn-duWFVPBOGuGXczWX0c5fbG6y4Mc1cC4JOlPdQe5iGUeC345FJmrgaD0dGamObKYqNDTdCkRdNEhGyVEXh5T1DS_XQYeXg2NUnmC0j18obsXjvjCqD1Gin20TcOCLWXYnwPJqtPbWB7wT54WiF5Hx-O88lWE6xO1T5gbP8-8BKVHIr-OLBIM8c6mh1M2jGYikxxUb "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: | | | | | | Hi Friend, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my FOURTH debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since the last debate! "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the power of OUR movement?" | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, now that we’ve gathered the required signatures and I officially filed for reelection, I wanted to make sure you heard from me: We submitted **2,860 signatures** from across all seven counties in IL-13 to run for reelection, which is **three times** the number of signatures required to file. I am blown away by the enthusiasm and support from our grassroots movement, and I am so excited for our road ahead. And with 2024 around the corner, it’s important that I hear directly from you about what issues matter most to you and your family. My number one priority is building a grassroots movement that moves people in all seven counties across IL-13 forward. While I would love to chat with you over a cup of coffee, surveys like this are the second best way for me to learn more about your priorities and what issues you’d like to see me fighting for in Washington. **[Will you take a moment to complete our final issues survey of the year? Click here to share your thoughts with us in our December Issues Survey>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74936245/443077027/839761357?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231210_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzcwOGY5MS04ZTk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anGDhED6MQwOM6--W1C2U7TWY3pfrHxVFQU9pke21wY=&emci=13708f91-8e97-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=23708f91-8e97-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=13891387)** | [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74936246/443077028/839761357?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231210_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzcwOGY5MS04ZTk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anGDhED6MQwOM6--W1C2U7TWY3pfrHxVFQU9pke21wY=&emci=13708f91-8e97-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=23708f91-8e97-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=13891387)

name: Colin Allred
subject: Just made this official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi, friend, it’s Colin Allred reaching out with some exciting news: I just officially filed to be on the ballot to become Texas’ next Senator in 2024!
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I’m so proud of how far we’ve come since launching this campaign – and it’s all because of folks like you. But if there was ever a moment to build on our momentum, this is it.
You and I both know that we don’t have to be embarrassed by our Senator – we can get a new one!
With my name officially on the ballot, Ted Cruz and his wealthy allies will be trying harder than ever to crush our movement, and I’m counting on you to help me show the strength of our grassroots team. That’s why I’m personally asking:
Will you split $25 or more between my campaign and Serve America to help me reach our goal to raise $150,000 today? Every dollar helps power our movement to defeat Ted Cruz, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and bring real leadership to Texas. Please, donate now. → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
My fight to defeat Ted Cruz is personal. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. She was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
I decided to run for Congress to help more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream. I beat the odds – and an 11-term Republican incumbent – to help Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m running against Ted Cruz because I’m sick and tired of watching him fail our state, and experts from CNN to FiveThirtyEight agree I can win. But not without your help, friend.
Thanks to wealthy mega donors and special interests, Ted Cruz has raised more than $40 million for his re-election campaign – and I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to make sure I have what it takes to compete.
Please, will you split an immediate donation of $25 or more between my campaign and Serve America so we can fire Ted Cruz and bring real leadership to Texas? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much for being a part of this movement. We still have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this.
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

subject: I hate asking for money, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74936538/443078134/475085866?refcode=jtk1279-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTA4MWQwNC04Zjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cV47y34wYgrq7_yzuD0kd5dta0SFi2RcYZKtmLnndsc=)

Peter, if you know me, you know that asking for campaign donations is probably my _least favorite_ part of the job.
And that's not to say that grassroots donations like yours don't matter, because they do _– so much_ more than I can ever articulate. In fact, it's thanks to grassroots donors like you that I'm even able to hold the most powerful and corrupt forces in the nation accountable –**because I know that, no matter how many millions of dollars they spend slandering me, I have an unwavering base of supporters behind me. **
I hate asking for money because I don't want to be distracted from my work – but with fights as large and vital as ours, I just can't afford to fall short of my fundraising goals. So I have to ask: [**Please, will you chip in right now to power my fight for progress in New York and beyond? I need to raise $10,000 before my midnight fundraising deadline passes and I need _your help_ to do that.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74936539/443078135/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1279-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTA4MWQwNC04Zjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cV47y34wYgrq7_yzuD0kd5dta0SFi2RcYZKtmLnndsc=)
