subject: where you at?
body:
____________________________________________________________________________ ? |
---
| | Remember when Facebook started in 2004?

It was new, exciting, and unique—something completely different (no offense, MySpace).

But now?

It's turned into a place that censors conservatives, throttles posts, and limits engagement.

This brings me to my next point: _are you on X (formerly known as Twitter)?_

I am, and it's quite the experience!

And ever since Elon Musk took over, I've noticed an increase in engagement, a decrease in content throttling, and fewer conservatives being banned or silenced.

So, if you're not on X yet and you're interested in Idaho politics...

>> [**Come join me**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=090cc0d5fc&e=dea908e0fe "Join the party")

Happy Sunday!

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.** Did you catch who's coming to my January fundraiser in Nampa? Idaho GOP superstar Brent Regan will be speaking, along with the world's #1 Gunfluencer, Garand Thumb! It's your chance to win a rifle, meet cool people, and rally before the next session starts.

name: Susan Wild
subject: I’ve done it before, and I’ll do it again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress

name: Michael B. Moore
subject: About my great-great-grandfather
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael B
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74937154/443080368/983305604?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.12.10_B1_RobertSmallsBio_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJmNTA4NjktOTA5Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qj7HukvpWKWOqVQtAqGYZ4uPiHfSULK7YYVqUaTxG80=) Peter, that's me and my late great-great-grandfather, Robert Smalls. Robert's life epitomized what it meant to get into good trouble, and his example inspires me every day. I'm going to tell you more about his story and after, I hope you'll feel inspired to [_**chip in a few bucks to help me win my battleground race here in South Carolina.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74937155/443080369/983305604?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.12.10_B1_RobertSmallsBio_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJmNTA4NjktOTA5Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qj7HukvpWKWOqVQtAqGYZ4uPiHfSULK7YYVqUaTxG80=) Robert was born a slave and was conscripted into the Confederacy to be a ship pilot during the Civil War. Because of his skills, he acquired the trust of the Confederate captains aboard his ship, the _Planter._ On an evening when the Confederate captains left the ship, Robert used his self-taught skills as a pilot to steer himself, and his Black crewmates and their families to safety in the North. The families that Robert steered to safety were given safe harbor, and the ship was gifted to the Union – helping build their naval fleet and win the war. Robert later came back to South Carolina and served as Congressman for Beaufort, dedicated to fighting injustice everywhere. My great-great-grandfather had the audacity to risk everything he had, never tire, and lead a life of service. **I'm running against Nancy Mace in my battleground district of SC-01 because Robert Smalls' fight isn't over, and I know South Carolina's best days are still ahead of us.** December is one of the most important months of our campaign. With a big end-of-year fundraising goal hurdling our way, we must generate as much grassroots momentum as possible. [_**I'm running for Congress to fight for families across the Lowcountry and continue the legacy of service instilled in me by my great-great-grandfather. Will you make a generous contribution of $15 or more to my campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74937156/443080370/983305604?&amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.12.10_B1_RobertSmallsBio_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJmNTA4NjktOTA5Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qj7HukvpWKWOqVQtAqGYZ4uPiHfSULK7YYVqUaTxG80=) If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [CHIP IN $15 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74937157/443080371/983305604?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.12.10_B1_RobertSmallsBio_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJmNTA4NjktOTA5Ny1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qj7HukvpWKWOqVQtAqGYZ4uPiHfSULK7YYVqUaTxG80=)

name: Team DPVA
subject: Trump’s second term
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Donald Trump has made his intentions clear if he wins re-election. He will dismantle our democracy piece by piece until authoritarian control is his and his alone. He will embolden his MAGA army, continuing to fuel hate, misinformation, and division.

|
---
Derek, Donald Trump has made his intentions clear if he wins re-election. He will dismantle our democracy piece by piece until authoritarian control is his and his alone. He will embolden his MAGA army, continuing to fuel hate, misinformation, and division. We can’t let that happen. The fight for America’s future has already begun, and we need to be all in. We’re racing to raise every resource we can as early as we can. [We know this fight is going to be hard and we have to be prepared. Let's make one thing clear: The path to the House majority goes through the Deep South.

**Louisiana, Georgia, and Alabama are all being ordered to redraw their voting maps because each original map deliberately weakened the voting power of Black residents.**

Right now, Republicans are pulling all the stops to maintain their majority — even if that means violating the _Voting Rights Act._ We know, you know, even _they_ know, that when Democrats have the majority, we get things done and create meaningful progress for all American people.

But maps will only get us so far. We must mobilize Black voters to ensure we get critical turnout numbers and get the representation we deserve.

We must mobilize Black voters to ensure we get critical turnout numbers and get the representation we deserve. Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

name: Biden-Harris Dems
subject: You’re the backbone of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
As 2023 comes to a close and we all begin to slow down and reflect on the past year, we must remember that this campaign is not stopping or slowing down anytime soon. | | |
---
Peter -- As 2023 comes to a close and we all begin to slow down and reflect on the past year, we must remember that this campaign is not stopping or slowing down anytime soon. **In fact, we’re only getting started.** From investing in TV and digital ads, to hiring more folks and growing our operation over at HQ, we’re working around the clock to secure another Biden-Harris victory. And that’s exactly why we need your help today. Every single donation given, every email read, every door knocked, and every call made will be the reason we keep MAGA Republicans out of the White House in 2024. You’re the backbone of our campaign and we couldn’t do this without you. **The only reason we’ve been able to invest in this important campaign infrastructure is the grassroots support we’ve received from this team, Peter.** [So we’re asking: Will you make your first donation to Joe’s reelection campaign today? clean_body: As 2023 comes to a close and we all begin to slow down and reflect on the past year, we must remember that this campaign is not stopping or slowing down anytime soon. | | | Peter -- As 2023 comes to a close and we all begin to slow down and reflect on the past year, we must remember that this campaign is not stopping or slowing down anytime soon. In fact, we’re only getting started. From investing in TV and digital ads, to hiring more folks and growing our operation over at HQ, we’re working around the clock to secure another Biden-Harris victory. And that’s exactly why we need your help today. Every single donation given, every email read, every door knocked, and every call made will be the reason we keep MAGA Republicans out of the White House in 2024. You’re the backbone of our campaign and we couldn’t do this without you. The only reason we’ve been able to invest in this important campaign infrastructure is the grassroots support we’ve received from this team, Peter. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Your support does not go unnoticed. Thank you. Biden-Harris Dems

name: James Carville
subject: Democrats in BIG trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
It’s not looking good

| Peter – I’ve worked in politics for half a century, so believe me when I tell you: **Democrats are in BIG trouble.**

The 2024 Senate map is the toughest one I’ve ever seen. Our razor-thin majority is hanging on by a single thread, and there’s no question that Mitch McConnell and his extremist cronies will use every trick up their sleeves to snatch back power.

**The GOP is coming at us with full force – and with experts saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, they’re zeroing in on Jacky Rosen as a TOP target for defeat. Now, brand new polling shows the Nevada Senate race in a statistical dead heat!!! It’s not looking good.**

[_**Jacky needs to raise another $15,000 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP attacks and fuel her campaign forward – but the ONLY way she can get there is with your immediate grassroots support. So PLEASE, will you split a $25 donation between her campaign and Fight for Progress right now?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74939134/443086791/-220169546?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-12-10_Z&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxMGY5NGNhLTk4OTctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wA3j8yCfWRp9P7IBTyWJqw89s5SSWZRnkwE44jewwmg=)

Democrats won in Nevada by _less than 1%_ last year, making it the closest Senate race in the entire country. Now that they have a second chance at winning in Nevada, Republicans aren’t going to leave anything up to chance – and they’re already pulling out all of the stops to flip this seat.

**If Jacky loses in Nevada, McConnell and his far-right posse will take back the majority and enact their dangerous, out-of-touch agenda. We CANNOT let this happen.**

In my expert opinion, we CAN win this race and keep control of the Senate – but that starts with raising the resources _today_ to prepare for the tough fight ahead.

[_**So please, I’m asking you one more time before the midnight deadline: Will you chip in as much as you can spare to Jacky’s campaign and Fight For Progress now to help her win in Nevada and defend our majority?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74939135/443086792/-220169546?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-12-10_Z&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxMGY5NGNhLTk4OTctZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wA3j8yCfWRp9P7IBTyWJqw89s5SSWZRnkwE44jewwmg=)

Thank you for being part of this incredible team. I’ve seen many grassroots campaigns in my lifetime, and I know this one has what it takes to win.

James Carville

clean_body: It’s not looking good | Peter – I’ve worked in politics for half a century, so believe me when I tell you: Democrats are in BIG trouble. The 2024 Senate map is the toughest one I’ve ever seen. Our razor-thin majority is hanging on by a single thread, and there’s no question that Mitch McConnell and his extremist cronies will use every trick up their sleeves to snatch back power. The GOP is coming at us with full force – and with experts saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, they’re zeroing in on Jacky Rosen as a TOP target for defeat. Now, brand new polling shows the Nevada Senate race in a statistical dead heat!!! It’s not looking good. = Democrats won in Nevada by less than 1% last year, making it the closest Senate race in the entire country. Now that they have a second chance at winning in Nevada, Republicans aren’t going to leave anything up to chance – and they’re already pulling out all of the stops to flip this seat. If Jacky loses in Nevada, McConnell and his far-right posse will take back the majority and enact their dangerous, out-of-touch agenda. We CANNOT let this happen. In my expert opinion, we CAN win this race and keep control of the Senate – but that starts with raising the resources today to prepare for the tough fight ahead. = Thank you for being part of this incredible team. I’ve seen many grassroots campaigns in my lifetime, and I know this one has what it takes to win. Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=00f8cd9d462b494e9eca7e27e048188f&_e=Fr2RtirfyhK-MDF_HWyYxiNWjUCmHUgHRfze4l94ZVAGl2VhofGxag_eNO0Lr6cmigbipAkrzopjB5j_l0VU1xYkXri5C244I2wv_TPp8Nl0f1g3NSMgavINGxz7XX4JjWP7WN8yg8gnu2vv4-UKERYaMyWZ6huEN0R34SEN8NixaTXmuXXyEBv4-0gEqszJS94RdhzGAlt3jOFMWiFKwg-ikj9Xl7586t-WtATyPHn9EPI14k86taNBvK2NVDdNCjK16dNfEgeZKzdWWD4VY2X01nKqcxFly9sqYNJqhEThDbyjeE7rXL9WXp1EKUG7pWrKNHbJvvMDFBRQdcsmtdF5JAjglxh5X0vK1EZEqzatp6Cr7MxCdH-sAMEnp6sKRekbZ5TdMUbQlETHSeCQ9Q%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

States like Florida are passing extreme abortion bans, leaving millions of Americans hundreds of miles away from the nearest abortion providers. And now, they're passing even more laws to strip away reproductive rights, criminalize doctors, and push their extreme agenda.
But that's just the beginning.
Almost all of the GOP candidates running for president support passing a national abortion ban and appointing even more anti-choice extremists to the Supreme Court. **Meanwhile, GOP senators like Rick Scott are likely to retake control of the Senate, giving them free rein to pass a far-right national ban!**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Tell Bayer-Monsanto to stop harming monarch butterflies
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186748?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Bayer-Monsanto is still contributing to the devastating decline in monarch butterflies.[Take action now! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186749?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Over the last 20 years, **850 million milkweed plants have VANISHED.** Monarchs need milkweed to survive as it’s the _only food source_ for monarch caterpillars, and without it, these beloved butterflies will run out of places to _reproduce and lay eggs._ But milkweed plants are being _**WIPED OUT**_ at record numbers due to a toxic pesticide called glyphosate. It’s the most widely used herbicide in the world and is the active ingredient in _**Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup.**_ Monarch populations are plummeting, and Roundup is a key driver in this **massive die-out.** **[In order to save monarch butterflies, we must demand that Bayer-Monsanto STOP producing this butterfly-harming product. Add your name now!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186750?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186751?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Monarchs are not only beautiful and iconic insects known for their striking orange and black patterns, but they are also critical pollinators that our ecosystems rely on. Losing monarchs forever would impact us _ALL._
Sadly, we’ve already **lost 90% of the North American monarch butterfly population** in the past two decades – and unless we _**STOP**_ the widespread use of glyphosate, which is killing off the milkweed monarchs depend on, then _**we could lose these precious butterflies forever.** _**[Will you take action right away to tell the corporate giants at Bayer-Monsanto to prioritize pollinators above profits and STOP selling Roundup?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186752?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2186751?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking action to save monarch butterflies.
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:
we need to ban him from the ballot NOW
| **Donald Trump Says He Would be “Dictator on Day One” if Elected** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/ban-trump/?source=VPP_20231210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=12020%2E878179%2E1Jp_xT) Our democracy could NEVER survive another Donald Trump term — _even on day one!_ **So we need to hear from 5,000 Democrats IMMEDIATELY:** [**[CONFIRM] Should Congress use the 14th Amendment to BAN Trump from office?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/ban-trump/?source=VPP_20231210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=12020%2E878179%2E1Jp_xT) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/ban-trump/?source=VPP_20231210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=12020%2E878179%2E1Jp_xT)

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/ban-trump/?source=VPP_20231210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=12020%2E878179%2E1Jp_xT)
**** 5,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY 10AM TOMORROW ****
* * *
Invoking the 14th amendment would bar Trump from EVER holding office – _we’d never have to worry about him becoming President again!_

**Legal experts say we have a strong chance of making this happen, but ONLY if there’s a groundswell of public support!**

That’s why we’re calling on 5,000 top Democrats to weigh in NOW:
[**[CONFIRM] Should Congress use the 14th Amendment to BAN Trump from office?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/ban-trump/?source=VPP_20231210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=11&akid=12020%2E878179%2E1Jp_xT)

name: James Carville
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Donald Trump won Pennsylvania by the slimmest margin in a presidential election since 1840.
_Carville here. It's not an exaggeration to say that the Senate AND the White House could all come down to PA, so before I get into it,**[please chip in whatever you can to re-elect Bob Casey and protect our Democratic Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231210-2?refcode=em20231210-2&refcode2=1343_552475_wA7aQI&akid=1343%2E552475%2EwA7aQI)**_
* * *
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231210-2?refcode=em20231210-2&refcode2=1343_552475_wA7aQI&akid=1343%2E552475%2EwA7aQI)
We CANNOT forget about 2016, Peter.
Donald Trump won Pennsylvania by **the slimmest margin in a presidential election since 1840.**
Yup -- you read that right: Because of 44,292 votes in PA, Donald Trump was elected president, ushering in one of the most disastrous political eras in American history...
Throughout Trump's four years, he appointed THREE anti-choice justices to the Supreme Court, cut taxes for the rich and his right-wing allies, tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and incited an insurrection.
And it's clear that 2024 could be a repeat of 2016... with Pennsylvania, once again, at the center of it all.
**[Before I go any further, can you make a donation to Bob Casey's re-election campaign to keep PA blue? Nobody knows PA like Bob, and he's going to need our help to stay in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231210-2?refcode=em20231210-2&refcode2=1343_552475_wA7aQI&akid=1343%2E552475%2EwA7aQI)**
I've been in politics a long time, so believe me when I say that **if the GOP flips PA red, Democrats can kiss the Senate AND the White House goodbye.**
With Trump and McConnell back in charge, they won't waste even a SECOND to implement their dangerous policies, including repealing the Affordable Care Act and stripping millions of Americans of their health care. And Bob Casey's opponent would be a “yes” vote every step of the way.
That's why I'm doing every doggone thing I can to re-elect Bob Casey. But I can't do it alone -- it's gonna take all of us working together, meaning you AND me, to protect this seat and defend our vulnerable Senate majority.
**[So can I count on you to chip in $5 to Bob's campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231210-2?refcode=em20231210-2&refcode2=1343_552475_wA7aQI&akid=1343%2E552475%2EwA7aQI)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231210-2?refcode=em20231210-2&refcode2=1343_552475_wA7aQI&akid=1343%2E552475%2EwA7aQI)**
With the stakes of this race higher than ever before, we can't leave anything to chance.
Thanks as always,
James Carville

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: No working family should have to live in fear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I know what it’s like because I experienced it myself.
#
Peter — every family living paycheck-to-paycheck has a similar fear:
**_Something_ happens, and you lose everything.**
For my family, that fear became a reality when my littlest sister was born with a heart condition that required surgeries at a hospital over 100 miles away. Maxed out credit cards and no money left, my parents were bankrupted by medical bills.
We relied on the generosity of our community in mid-Missouri to make it through that time. Friends, neighbors, members of our church — everyday people who had no more than we did, taking care of each other when times got tough.
**That’s something Josh Hawley could never understand.** He’s spent his entire political career acting on behalf of the giant corporations and political elites who’ve spent decades gutting our state.
I’m running for U.S. Senate because no working family should live in fear. I know what that’s like — and I’m ready to fight like hell to make sure families like the ones in my old community have the resources they need to build strong, healthy, and secure lives all across our state. clean_body: I know what it’s like because I experienced it myself. Peter — every family living paycheck-to-paycheck has a similar fear: Something happens, and you lose everything. For my family, that fear became a reality when my littlest sister was born with a heart condition that required surgeries at a hospital over 100 miles away. Maxed out credit cards and no money left, my parents were bankrupted by medical bills. We relied on the generosity of our community in mid-Missouri to make it through that time. Friends, neighbors, members of our church — everyday people who had no more than we did, taking care of each other when times got tough. That’s something Josh Hawley could never understand. He’s spent his entire political career acting on behalf of the giant corporations and political elites who’ve spent decades gutting our state. I’m running for U.S. Senate because no working family should live in fear. I know what that’s like — and I’m ready to fight like hell to make sure families like the ones in my old community have the resources they need to build strong, healthy, and secure lives all across our state. But I can’t do it without your help, Peter: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m so glad to have you on my team, Peter. subject: Reaching out to you quickly

body:
I won’t take up too much of your time today, but I need to ask for your support
#

---
Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords.
I won’t take up too much of your time on a weekend. But I need to reach out to ask you to [**make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231210-1-30&t=2&akid=7018%2E3935704%2EYLDQo5)

Here’s why:
This month is our very last chance to reach our goals for the year. The goals we set for the year and for each and every month are **not** arbitrary. We set these benchmarks because we know what it will take for us to keep passing gun safety legislation at every level of government. With an election year coming up, we know what it will take to compete with the gun lobby and their large sums of money.
We can reach our goals for the year and set ourselves up for success in 2024. I know it. But not without this community pitching in what they can, whenever they can.
[**So please, can I count on you to add a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231210-1-30&t=4&akid=7018%2E3935704%2EYLDQo5)

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: A couple questions for you...
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_Rc9pEgVC3/ZVo2ZzY5dGpKREZ2U2ttaXRjamFmYXhYbEQ4UVpJV1hMNDFNbzArU0tiSGV6OWZsQU53Q1dZZ1QzTUNQaFJKazFmdmpqbGc4UnZ0ZjBXN0ZoUzU1U3MzUy9jMzhpcllqaHZqUk9oSENRV0U9S0/WU15WW9xT21CWGgzTjJqcTZBVEFRa1ZUcFQrWENEWG42Nlo4YTZmSS9pRVhGN3NKVFpKQkpGc0w0eVZjSEEvc1ZORlpSejJjMDdtTzVFUWo3T1diN2VCRmQ0VVpSbDhNS0

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10348187&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDE3MzI0MwS2&spReportId=MTg4MDE3MzI0MwS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10348187&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDE3MzI0MwS2&spReportId=MTg4MDE3MzI0MwS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6feP4q6JR/ZVo2ZzY5dGpKREZ2U2ttaXRjamFmYXhYbEQ4UVpJV1hMNDFNbzArU0tiSGV6OWZsQU53Q1dZZ1QzTUNQaFJKazFmdmpqbGc4UnZ0ZjBXN0ZoUzU1U3MzUy9jMzhpcllqaHZqUk9oSENRV0U9S0/

subject: Sharing my journey
body:
Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=a4abaf3edeca40e3a8a13587f4c1929a&_t=sPFEihuQe29IIhR_x9eKJVGtx-Muo8o3MTdE1LmMRXXBNOP1OJwh7-Ay5q_nmEQpibMET1-1tsy0zzoy5IPNrkB1hJNEPY2WZkgqPVnsBHA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=a4abaf3edeca40e3a8a13587f4c1929a&_t=sPFEihuQe29IIhR_x9eKJVGtx-Muo8o3MTdE1LmMRXXBNOP1OJwh7-Ay5q_nmEQpibMET1-1tsy0zzoy5IPNrkB1hJNEPY2WZkgqPVnsBHA%3D)

Peter,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a4abaf3edeca40e3a8a13587f4c1929a&_e=wRwJCRs8SpA722v3eBvIqbcyuo5CF-ezvTOa1y6jMzjkepR1eFufdy2q-KsG6lpOAAu5Yj0yg6z3ZD83nVPpfVxGOXruPc0g-mV7_5aGkpgb0khwQPwqf7K_fyETv8fGJkrhJLxsY4vjWJW0EfZPL3m-E4f7TWakPR2t3bwl1XOv1mbxRW9OqvFiFVkCXeS0PdkefG62ro-ntgZyftIc0Qf9GijHpdGR7tpVWhDr7QOF6gNIzTB_FL0Yemd1MmhlQKDE6kz2lyycSd85W6SuAnPQJQAhPOyda82l0S_IpNSKKbKfOe44OQrrdi-GA_BvouD53zcoCqCiIMxhy6TA9JB-fxDlX676vR4U_cULjbfK0ZDDRGsc4che0mpu87UF)**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable._**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a4abaf3edeca40e3a8a13587f4c1929a&_e=wRwJCRs8SpA722v3eBvIqbcyuo5CF-ezvTOa1y6jMzjkepR1eFufdy2q-KsG6lpOAAu5Yj0yg6z3ZD83nVPpfVxGOXruPc0g-mV7_5aGkpgb0khwQPwqf7K_fyETv8fGJkrhJLxsY4vjWJW0EfZPL3m-E4f7TWakPR2t3bwl1XOv1mbxRW9OqvFiFVkCXeS0PdkefG62ro-ntgZyftIc0Qf9GijHpdGR7tpVWhDr7QP49caeHbF0h3EA536eaO9W8tgHI16sioX-N5BarEKqo_zUhDtYOWAQopldbv-GKDfvf9rP1QNx-4NG-9VcW3NbCJjZ3fHVB0Yw_DpScdiDyJyHziyAY8_QxGNwEl44bsyp2lWC6yXPL75fFYJamO8u)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.

---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.** ➡️

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a4abaf3edeca40e3a8a13587f4c1929a&_e=wRwJCRs8SpA722v3eBvIqbcyuo5CF-ezvTOa1y6jMzjkepR1eFufdy2q-KsG6lpOAAu5Yj0yg6z3ZD83nVPpfVxGOXruPc0g-mV7_5aGkpgb0khwQPwqf7K_fyETv8fGJkrhJLxsY4vjWJW0EfZPL3m-E4f7TWakPR2t3bwl1XOv1mbxRW9OqvFiFVkCXeS0PdkefG62ro-ntgZyftIc0Qf9GijHpdGR7tpVWhDr7QPvZm-A9xTLbKbjVelWWa8e5eRZ0hDO7vtdCwLH1Bli8avgoNS7dkKETBfoK9h31_a63_9qFw0U81A_Xtqr6NlBIed6thkCdc8U_Kf2MXuJ3IMD9KO6A96xXNuyJVAnkqiPRYjfugX6NSVJtZX3LBDn)
---
When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a4abaf3edeca40e3a8a13587f4c1929a&_e=wRwJCRs8SpA722v3eBvIqbcyuo5CF-ezvTOa1y6jMzjkepR1eFufdy2q-KsG6lpOAAu5Yj0yg6z3ZD83nVPpfVxGOXruPc0g-mV7_5aGkpgb0khwQPwqf7K_fyETv8fGJkrhJLxsY4vjWJW0EfZPL3m-E4f7TWakPR2t3bwl1XOv1mbxRW9OqvFiFVkCXeS0PdkefG62ro-ntgZyftIc0Qf9GijHpdGR7tpVWhDr7QPJBCirCAmlnGQ1QdNZBe0r3Narq1aVCAIuNN24gJlmDOIaZJrq3aztnoHaI-O056jEaseUoteUWoCfFbnGmr8ddbH8CCArUbqVS6nxB8oKnMILqeAM2In4RBq-Wx2w1L2qHDcOoZEBU658mb0DpZm-)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if _every single person reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a4abaf3edeca40e3a8a13587f4c1929a&_e=wRwJCRs8SpA722v3eBvIqbcyuo5CF-ezvTOa1y6jMzjkepR1eFufdy2q-KsG6lpOAAu5Yj0yg6z3ZD83nVPpfVxGOXruPc0g-mV7_5aGkpgb0khwQPwqf7K_fyETv8fGJkrhJLxsY4vjWJW0EfZPL3m-E4f7TWakPR2t3bwl1XOv1mbxRW9OqvFiFVkCXeS0PdkefG62ro-ntgZyftIc0Qf9GijHpdGR7tpVWhDr7QM2o7HbuZ4xmdvj3V5SCOI4R1SAVC6O5Lv9r9FRhfQPK_YZN4fEKR16_LbZlx9wdKzYOXUQeCTmzN4BdeZ0Mg1SqgsQ9JDPYHbOUPKoPl3_agRU27syHKVHUMJBYoNSDu8eHpP_hr_XCkD_pCQcpvIi)**

clean_body: Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future. | | | | | Peter, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable.Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. | | When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | - Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. | | Peter, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74940450/443091359/-1514006159?refcode=email_121023_Family-rs&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmIwYTFlNy1hNjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yWmgipnpIUbH6BVZfJ9B5m9ScT84oJJFwMd5FZfIRyY=) My grandmother was a foot soldier in the Civil Rights Movement. She organized in Selma, Alabama to guarantee our most fundamental rights. My mother joined the Air Force after college and worked so hard to rise to the rank of Lieutenant Colonel. My father also honorably served our nation in the Air Force for over 20 years, and held the rank of Senior Master Sergeant when he retired. **For as long as I can remember, my family instilled in me the importance of integrity and service to others.** That’s why I first ran for the House of Delegates and became one of the youngest women ever elected to state government. But today, so many of the freedoms my family fought for are at risk. And too many in Congress would rather score political points than find solutions to the issues our communities face every day. We need to get Congress working again, and that starts with winning this battleground race in Virginia. If Democrats are going to have a chance of winning back the House, we need to win. name: Chuck Grassley
subject: This has been going on since 2006
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
It’s not hard to recognize someone worth helping. I’ve identified Tim Sheehy as someone I think would be tremendous to work with and I need your help to get him to Washington. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=223ec071097f42a788f1809d4b538961&_t=F7QW-pNkfOnTi9BgtNLYMW1NpqvO_fK44G2XyozjN0bXwDJSMzxlRI-42Rep8k5-RmQ4lkfLAUAFWwPIOFdbGzz65pP9kzPCMvYd4ulLX2Q%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=223ec071097f42a788f1809d4b538961&_t=F7QW-pNkfOnTi9BgtNLYMW1NpqvO_fK44G2XyozjN0bXwDJSMzxlRI-42Rep8k5-RmQ4lkfLAUAFWwPIOFdbGzz65pP9kzPCMvYd4ulLX2Q%3D)

_**"Let's put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate."** \- U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley_

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I’m in need of a favor.

**Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully pulled the wool over voters’ eyes into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because the reality is his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana. **His voting record would give him a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.**

**Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate.** If you don’t want to read to the end of this note, please make sure you click this link to donate to help Navy Seal Tim Sheehy WIN and FLIP the Senate RED before you close out your browser.

[**JOIN ME
SUPPORT A NAVY SEAL FOR SENATE TODAY **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=223ec071097f42a788f1809d4b538961&_e=KeA8xyg-zhW725PjnuybNkFJMLWIlLAs-3g0I8GvLDmQPE7NXr8lRWx10jxY997QyhlF2R4wDgSulAOPCbAqnN04kTBuY9dODDNfBocaP8V6CySjVGaRkHNi4DIICOse2NQGivwFfV53unOHU5GFtTmWOY4XUFy0Q7BxauBu_8sBJmCCvS0noiXKPFiM-TYVoieM6CtM3P6g5NJTHLJZHu2hgak_R0L6YsMo14lqQEVKYFYAHSpyvOMfO7nfHyw0_yYadpvX8Y99-GQ7Tmh8RXGhBb4wAnnpXhHu4tnPd6KSbgzdeDo6TG6zBUH91MleT05QTToulqLGdJTqseFqdfLETcj7NqUp2SilGhh80zkJKnR5dvGziS9Q2KAEZSEu539LiDsVwU7gvWSdLfhsw-87iop5b2zP386FA920WXI%3D)

After 16 years of Jon Tester voting in lock step for a liberal agenda, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. We can’t afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74940815/443092671/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTZkNjQ3NC1hNzk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-nNTbaHqx6mygJh89IL04GruxQWiUX1ccp38aQETQL8=&emci=05caf9ef-1f96-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4a6d6474-a797-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert last year, we were the underdogs until the very end.
Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies.
Ultimately, though, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country.
The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money.
In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we _knew_ we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions.
Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book.
It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he’s running again against Lauren Boebert. We need to make sure that we have the time and the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024.
Adam can win. But Boebert’s allies are already attacking him, and Adam’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to defeat Lauren Boebert, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now:
[**This was the closest race in the country in 2022. It could be even closer in 2024. Please, will you give $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign – any amount you can afford will go a long way – and make sure we have the resources to finally defeat Lauren Boebert?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74940823/443092680/1610638071?refcode=em20231210pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=4a6d6474-a797-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTZkNjQ3NC1hNzk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-nNTbaHqx6mygJh89IL04GruxQWiUX1ccp38aQETQL8=)

clean_body: Adam might not say it, but I will. Hello, When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert last year, we were the underdogs until the very end. Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies. Ultimately, though, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country. The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money. In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we knew we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions. Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book. It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he’s running again against Lauren Boebert. We need to make sure that we have the time and the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024. Adam can win. But Boebert’s allies are already attacking him, and Adam’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to defeat Lauren Boebert, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = From our entire family, thank you. Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Too important not to ask…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

$3, Peter.
That is the donation we are asking you to make today. Yes, $3. It's vitally important. Too important not to ask. Here's why:
$3 because our FEC fundraising deadline is coming up and when it ends we're legally required to report not just how much we raise, but the number of donations we receive will be public as well.
$3 because a good report will lead to more endorsements as people who have been on the fence for months see our campaign as our only chance to take back Arizona’s seat.
$3 because when we report our numbers early next month, so will Kyrsten Sinema and Kari Lake. If we out raise them, especially with small donors, their campaigns could take a hit. The GOP billionaires funding them might cut and run if they see us absolutely CRUSHING their fundraising with an army of grassroots supporters.
Now... we know $3 may not seem like it can do ALL OF THAT, but it all adds up. A few folks have probably already donated in the time it took you to read this email.
They’re hoping you'll do the same.
Ruben does too.
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $3 directly to Ruben Gallego's campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona? Do it before our FEC deadline ends. It all adds up when we're all chipping in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231210-2&t=1&akid=1535%2E734936%2EP_fHHc)

With YOU at my side for this final battle, we will PROVE that no matter how many despicable witch hunts they throw at us or schemes they concoct to try and erase your vote, we will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left's tyranny! | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: this is the greatest moral failing of our time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
there have been more than 600 mass shootings in 2023
| | |
---
Friend, did you know that there have already been more than 600 mass shootings in 2023? **On average, more than 100 Americans die from gun violence _every single day._**
_This is the greatest moral failing of our time, friend._
I know the toll that this horrific violence takes on a family. When I was 24, my father was killed in an act of gun violence. Getting that news was the worst phone call of my life. But I was determined to channel my grief and pain into action.
Ever since then, I've fought to protect our communities from gun violence. In Congress, I pushed for common-sense reforms that would keep guns away from dangerous individuals.

After leaving Congress, I teamed up with Gabby Giffords to lead her gun safety advocacy work here in Florida and across the country. It was an honor to work so closely with Gabby, meeting so many survivors of gun violence, hearing their stories, holding our lawmakers accountable, and fighting for change.
**Now, I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott, one of the gun lobby's biggest allies, and finally pass the common-sense reforms that families are counting on. Experts say this race will be one of the most competitive elections in 2024, but I need your help to take on Scott's massive fortune.

[Will you donate before 11:59 p.m. to help me take the fight against gun violence all the way to the U.S. Senate? clean_body: I just filed. | = | Peter, It’s official: I just filed to appear on the ballot in California’s 9th district! = I’m running because I believe our democracy is in danger. For the second time I’ll be running on the same ballot as Donald Trump. I’m running to do my part to help Democrats take back the House from MAGA extremists, protect abortion rights, and get our government back to working for the people again. That’s why I decided not to run for the open Senate seat in California this year. Instead, I’m running for re-election in one of the most competitive House races in the country and I’m asking for your support. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Ballots for the March election are mailed out early next year, so this filing is a turning point for our campaign - it’s time to step it up! Thank you so much for your support, Josh Harder *

body:
Don’t abandon House Democrats >>
| **_⚠️ FINAL NOTICE ⚠️_
DEADLINE: EXPIRED
SIGNATURE STATUS: MISSING**
* * *
You were hand-selected as one of 500 top supporters to sign our card standing with House Democrats — **_yet your signature is nowhere to be found._** [**We’re giving you ONE last chance to sign or you’ll be moved to our NON-SUPPORTER list: Please add your name now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57967?t=6&akid=12023%2E878179%2EVGoufW) | [Donate $3 to sign the card now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57967?t=7&akid=12023%2E878179%2EVGoufW)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear House Democrats,

_Thank you for your incredible work for the American people!_**

The far-right Republican majority is a total DISASTER, even ousting their own Speaker and electing a new extremist.

Meanwhile, your caucus under Rep. Hakeem Jeffries’s leadership is unified and dedicated to saving abortion rights, voting rights, our democracy, and more.

Your strength makes me proud to be a Democrat — **and gives me hope that we can take down the GOP’s razor-thin majority next November!**

[**Fighting against the MAGA dark money machine won’t be easy, so I’m chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help flip the 5 seats we need to turn the House BIDEN-BLUE! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57967?t=8&akid=12023%2E878179%2EVGoufW) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57967?t=9&akid=12023%2E878179%2EVGoufW)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12023%2E878179%2EVGoufW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12023%2E878179%2EVGoufW).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12023%2E878179%2EVGoufW) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=12023%2E878179%2EVGoufW). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12023%2E878179%2EVGoufW)

Will you sign on and commit to helping Senator Tammy Baldwin win her seat in any way you can? We need 10,000 to step up and take this pledge before midnight tonight. Tammy Baldwin is a...
✓ Progressive force fighting for affordable health care. In fact, she helped pass the Affordable Care Act, a huge step in giving millions of people access to the care they need.
✓ Trailblazer as the first openly gay Senator to serve in the Senate, who led the charge to codify same-sex marriage into federal law late last year.
✓ Fierce advocate for reproductive rights. Time and time again, she steps up and votes to protect the right to an abortion at all costs, even co-sponsoring the Women’s Health Protection Act.
We need to keep her in the Senate to continue fighting for us, but she’s at risk of losing her seat with Wisconsin now being a top target for Republicans.
Sign on now and pledge to help Tammy Baldwin win re-election in any way you can and help Democrats maintain the Senate majority >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/VyaLP-HWxE6JygmHisSqxA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_231210_1_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]

Thank you for supporting Democrats.
– Defeat Republicans

body:
Trump’s comments are not just a wink and nod to authoritarianism; they are a promise.
**Trump Says He’ll Be a Dictator on ‘Day One’**
-_The Atlantic_
This is not a drill, team.

Earlier this week, Donald Trump admitted on _live television_ that he would be a “dictator on day one.”

This is the face of the Republican Party and the clear frontrunner for the GOP presidential nomination. Once he’s the official nominee, every Republican in Congress, including my opponent Mike Lawler, will line up squarely behind him.

If Trump wins the presidency, Congress will be the last line of defense to stop him.

It’s been made clear there are no Republicans left in Congress capable or willing to stand up to Trump and MAGA extremism. My opponent, Mike Lawler, worked on Donald Trump’s last two elections and continues to do his bidding. **That’s why retaking our House majority is more important than ever.**

[**We are three weeks away from entering the 2024 election year; there is no time to waste. | Now that the secret’s out, Eric Hovde will make his official announcement any day now.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1673%2E35263%2EzVNIhP)

**NEW YORK TIMES:
_"Democrats Try a Novel Tactic to Revive the Equal Rights Amendment"_**

Friend, Kirsten Gillibrand is boldly leading the fight to finally enshrine equal rights in our Constitution and END gender-based discrimination. **But she needs to know whether you support this fight — _[_please respond before midnight:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74942493/443098260/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4630-su-nd&refcode=jtk4630-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTI5M2VkNC1iNjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l4MrAqP9Qezxckg2GeHXhI-boJy--nCW5rWlBEOdtX4=&emci=93370f19-fe95-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=39293ed4-b697-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=7659029)_**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74942494/443098261/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4630-su-nd&refcode=jtk4630-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTI5M2VkNC1iNjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l4MrAqP9Qezxckg2GeHXhI-boJy--nCW5rWlBEOdtX4=&emci=93370f19-fe95-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=39293ed4-b697-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=7659029)
Friend, Kirsten has been on the front lines of the toughest fights in Washington since DAY ONE. She's been a fierce leader for gender equality, a tireless advocate for survivors of sexual harassment and a relentless fighter for family rights.
Now Kirsten is leading the fight for progress yet again: **She's announced a bold new strategy to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment after 100 years of tireless advocacy from some monumental female leaders!**
Right now, a single arbitrary deadline is the ONLY THING stopping the Equal Rights Amendment from being added to our Constitution. Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent that deadline. And once the ERA is certified, it gives us a constitutional basis to accomplish so much of what we've spent decades fighting for:_ ending the __gender __pay gap, protecting marriage equality and even restoring reproductive rights nationwide._
**Like Kirsten said, we need the Equal Rights Amendment now more than ever. But Republicans are already scheming to block her resolution!** As Kirsten takes on this hugely important fight, she needs to know if grassroots people like you will have her back. **Please, will you respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show Kirsten where YOU stand?**
**Do you support the Equal Rights Amendment?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74942495/443098262/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4630-su-nd&refcode=jtk4630-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTI5M2VkNC1iNjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l4MrAqP9Qezxckg2GeHXhI-boJy--nCW5rWlBEOdtX4=&emci=93370f19-fe95-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=39293ed4-b697-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=7659029)

|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74942497/443098264/1575385346?code=jtk4630-su-nd&refcode=jtk4630-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTI5M2VkNC1iNjk3LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l4MrAqP9Qezxckg2GeHXhI-boJy--nCW5rWlBEOdtX4=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. clean_body: Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us where you stand >> Please, will you respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show us where YOU stand? | | | NEW YORK TIMES: "Democrats Try a Novel Tactic to Revive the Equal Rights Amendment" Friend, Kirsten Gillibrand is boldly leading the fight to finally enshrine equal rights in our Constitution and END gender-based discrimination. But she needs to know whether you support this fight — Friend, Kirsten has been on the front lines of the toughest fights in Washington since DAY ONE. She's been a fierce leader for gender equality, a tireless advocate for survivors of sexual harassment and a relentless fighter for family rights. Now Kirsten is leading the fight for progress yet again: She's announced a bold new strategy to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment after 100 years of tireless advocacy from some monumental female leaders! Right now, a single arbitrary deadline is the ONLY THING stopping the Equal Rights Amendment from being added to our Constitution. Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent that deadline. And once the ERA is certified, it gives us a constitutional basis to accomplish so much of what we've spent decades fighting for: ending the gender pay gap, protecting marriage equality and even restoring reproductive rights nationwide. Like Kirsten said, we need the Equal Rights Amendment now more than ever. But Republicans are already scheming to block her resolution! As Kirsten takes on this hugely important fight, she needs to know if grassroots people like you will have her back. Please, will you respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show Kirsten where YOU stand? Do you support the Equal Rights Amendment? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
